name: Blue Georgia
subject: focus group invitation for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
You've been selected: Will you help shape our strategy to win in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats?
| | |
---
Friend,

Political analysts from MSNBC to Stacey Abrams confirm that Georgia is the number one battleground state in the country - so if we lose here, we could throw away our only shot to take back the Senate.

That's why our campaign strategy needs to be informed by on-the-ground insights from top Democrats. We put together a list of supporters most dedicated to flipping Georgia blue, and your name was on it.
**With polls showing this race statistically tied, the GOP is pulling out all the stops to defeat our people-powered movement. To fight back effectively and make sure our message reaches voters in this historic election, we need your critical insights before it's too late: **

**[Will you join our quick battleground focus group and help shape our strategy to win in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-battleground-fg?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk401-su-nd&phone=")**
| | [Join the Focus Group](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-battleground-fg?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk401-su-nd&phone=")
---
While our extremist Republican opponent, Kelly Loeffler, is using dog-whistle politics and her own multi-million dollar fortune to buy this seat, Reverend Warnock is working to earn the support and trust of every single Georgian.
Here's the thing: Our people-powered movement is _surging_. The only thing standing in our way is Loeffler and the GOP - who are pouring millions of dollars into ads attacking Democrats and firing up the Republican base.

**That's why your immediate input on this battleground race couldn't be more important, friend** - **and why we're counting on you to join our invite-only focus group before it expires at midnight tonight.**
**Here's the link we generated for you so we can track your answers specifically: [warnockforgeorgia.com/battleground-focus-group/id#235403](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-battleground-fg?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk401-su-nd&phone=")**
Thanks in advance, friend - your insights are invaluable.

Team Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e2c3/288179be/942e34e/348f0bd6/356928039/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031
---

name: MJ Hegar HQ
subject: McConnell: "If we can't keep Texas red, we won't be able to keep our majority."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Let's ditch him.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e60/7f51f7bc/40fcd256/4ef78176/2061868053/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e60/7f51f7bc/40fcd256/4ef78175/2061868053/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NzgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200806.3nd__1878__&amount=10")
---
Peter,

Mitch McConnell is scared. He knows that Sen. Cornyn is vulnerable in Texas, so he's trying to bail out his right-hand man!

**[Make a donation to help us tell McConnell: Don't mess with Texas!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e60/7f51f7bc/40fcd256/4ef78175/2061868053/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NzgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200806.3nd__1878__&amount=10")**

Mitch is right to be scared. If MJ wins in November, we'll flip the Senate, and not only will Sen. Cornyn be forced to retire -- but Mitch McConnell will finally be out as Senate Majority Leader.

And without Majority Leader McConnell in control, we'll _finally_ see movement on the legislation we need. Would you believe that he's kept the most recent COVID-19 relief bill in limbo for three months?!

Once we elect MJ, we won't have to worry about McConnell and Sen. Cornyn blocking critical legislation that would expand access to health care and get our economy back on track. **Will you step up and help us defeat them in November?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e60/7f51f7bc/40fcd256/4ef78174/2061868053/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NzgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200806.3nd__1878__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e60/7f51f7bc/40fcd256/4ef7816b/2061868053/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NzgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200806.3nd__1878__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e60/7f51f7bc/40fcd256/4ef7816a/2061868053/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NzgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200806.3nd__1878__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e60/7f51f7bc/40fcd256/4ef78169/2061868053/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NzgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200806.3nd__1878__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e60/7f51f7bc/40fcd256/4ef78168/2061868053/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NzgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200806.3nd__1878__")**
\-- Team MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e60/7f51f7bc/40fcd256/4ef78175/2061868053/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NzgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200806.3nd__1878__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e60/7f51f7bc/40fcd256/4ef7816f/2061868053/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NzgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1878&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e60/7f51f7bc/40fcd256/4ef7816e/2061868053/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

We need 5,000 Pennsylvania responses before midnight to get an accurate sample size.

**[PLEASE CONFIRM: Are you voting for Democrats in this historic election?](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b315/18e32a7f/4de45e0a/7b210eef/3781376274/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Joe-Biden-Democratic-Strategy-Survey?source=20200802_em_pet_b1_bajav_90_rs")**

* * *

We need to know if voters in Pennsylvania plan to vote for Joe Biden and Senate Democrats. **[But our records indicate your voter status is still undecided!](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b315/18e32a7f/4de45e0a/7b210eef/3781376274/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Joe-Biden-Democratic-Strategy-Survey?source=20200802_em_pet_b1_bajav_90_rs")**

CONSTITUENT ID: **[252485](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b315/18e32a7f/4de45e0a/7b210eef/3781376274/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Joe-Biden-Democratic-Strategy-Survey?source=20200802_em_pet_b1_bajav_90_rs")**

Barack, Joe, and Senate Democrats like Ben Ray are counting on your vote to make history.

But we're sending Ben Ray these final responses tomorrow morning, so we need all confirmations in by midnight.
**[PLEASE CONFIRM: Are you voting for Democrats in this historic election?](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b315/18e32a7f/4de45e0a/7b210eef/3781376274/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/Joe-Biden-Democratic-Strategy-Survey?source=20200802_em_pet_b1_bajav_90_rs")**

Team BRL

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. name: Forrest Barnwell-Hagemeyer
subject: what I’m thinking in these final hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
The polls close tonight - here’s what we need to do before then.
[](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhinyd-ojdkijhkdh-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friend, Polls close tonight at 7pm Central - here’s what I’m thinking about in these final hours:
1. **This is a DEAD HEAT****.** The polls have been neck and neck for the past few weeks. _Everything depends on who pushes the hardest in these last few hours._
2. At this point, **we are doing everything we can to get out the vote.** Phones, digital - you name it, we are tracking down everyone who hasn’t voted yet to make sure they turn out today.
3. Right now I’m looking at our balance sheet - and **if we had more funds, we could do more.** And that’s why I’m asking you today: [**please donate**](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhinyd-ojdkijhkdh-j/).

[GET US OVER THE FINISH LINE - DONATE NOW](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhinyd-ojdkijhkdh-t/) And there’s one more thing I want to make sure I say: **Right now, I am immensely thankful for our passionate volunteers and supporters.** The fact that we’re tied, despite having to go up against the Establishment’s Machine? That’s because of you, friend. _**But we can’t let up now.**_ “A statistical dead heat” doesn’t mean anything once the polls are closed. If we want to win - we’ve got to keep pushing. We’ve got to push harder than we’ve ever pushed before. **That’s why I’m asking you: please, donate today. Help us fund our get out the vote efforts. Be the donation that pushes us to victory.** [DONATE NOW](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhinyd-ojdkijhkdh-i/) Thank you,
Forrest Barnwell-Hagemeyer
Dr. Manny Sethi for Senate Copyright © 2020 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

name: Team Joe
subject: Join our National Volunteer Call this Sunday:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Every day, we're building a powerhouse movement strong enough to take on Donald Trump and your role in this movement matters. Join our National Volunteer Call this Sunday. |
---
Peter,

This election year is different. Our country is different. We've seen a wave of grassroots supporters from across the country coming together -- _online_ \-- to find community and do something good during these tough times. It has been incredible.

Every day, we're building a powerhouse movement strong enough to take on Donald Trump and your role in this movement matters. It's important that you own a piece of our campaign to elect Joe Biden.

[That's why this Sunday we're hosting our National Volunteer Call (with special guests!) to break down our plans for the Democratic National Convention and what's next for our campaign -- and we wanted to make sure you were personally invited, Peter.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea335/810167063/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.mobilize.us/joebiden/event/296868/?source=JB_EM_EV_2020.08.06_B8_natvolcal_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_EV_2020.08.06_B8_natvolcal_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") | | **National Volunteer Call** Sunday, August 9, 2020
6 PM ET/3 PM PT RSVP below for a link to the virtual event!
---
| [**RSVP now >>**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea335/810167063/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.mobilize.us/joebiden/event/296868/?source=JB_EM_EV_2020.08.06_B8_natvolcal_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_EV_2020.08.06_B8_natvolcal_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
Through it all, we've turned to you to help spread the word of our campaign far and wide and you've stepped up time and again. Today, we're turning to you again to join our call and hear how you can help elect Joe Biden as our next president.

[RSVP for our National Volunteer Call and let us know if we can count on you to be there >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea335/810167063/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.mobilize.us/joebiden/event/296868/?source=JB_EM_EV_2020.08.06_B8_natvolcal_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_EV_2020.08.06_B8_natvolcal_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
Thanks for all you do.

Team Joe

P.S. Can't join the call? No problem! [Make sure you're signed up to volunteer with Team Joe and we'll send you more ways to take action on our campaign.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea334/810167063/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Distributed-volunteers?source=JB_EM_EV_2020.08.06_B8_natvolcal_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea333/810167063/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea332/810167063/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea331/810167063/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea330/810167063/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea32f/810167063/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea32e/810167063/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea32d/810167063/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea32c/810167063/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea32b/810167063/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea32a/810167063/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea32d/810167063/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea329/810167063/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea32c/810167063/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bab2/1cd0ac28/17df1c59e/357ea328/810167063/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Forrest Barnwell-Hagemeyer
subject: WARNING: Hagerty’s Election Day dirty tricks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
Hagerty’s campaign is trying to suppress our voters--don’t let them keep you home!
[](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhdjhyk-ojdkijhkdh-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friend, **We’ve just received word that late in the day here, Bill Hagerty’s campaign is emailing voters and calling them with false exit polling. They are claiming to be far, far ahead in today’s primary election, in order to scare our people and keep them at home.** **The poll is another Bill Hagerty lie, these numbers are garbage.** They’re doing this with the clear intent of suppressing our voters and getting our people to stay home in a close race. Friend, this race has been dead even for weeks --and you know who thinks that more than anyone? Bill Hagerty. Just look at the millions of dollars he’s poured into sleazy attack ads the last few weeks. You don’t do that when you’re winning. Hagerty is desperate and willing to do anything, even lying to voters on Election Day. **Don’t let Hagerty fool you. This race is close, and we need you. | Dr. Anthony S. Fauci to Join Governor Gina Raimondo to Discuss Reopening Schools
---
| 3:00 p.m. on Thursday, August 13th, 2020
---
| Friend,
I'd like to share some exciting news with you.
Next Thursday at 3:00 p.m., Dr. Anthony S. Fauci, Director of the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID) at the National Institutes of Health, will join our weekly Facebook Live forum for a discussion about how to reopen our schools in a way that balances health and safety concerns with our children's need for a high-quality education. I've been so inspired by Dr. Fauci's leadership during this crisis and during his long career in public service, and I'm looking forward to this robust and thoughtful conversation. I hope that you'll join us by watching on [my Facebook page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vuBQKCxHc7CYzkLQweyZENfParfdej62PVK1yp_OVMFs84bghyr3XwUd7FtGxucK6YTRPRgKgPc275kN1L6lIRe8WHuTH-GxEGy49rOs5zEc4uN1nWMaMx-husTP_F_-lT76HUFv_9kwEML2LP0CyaXEDv30gRMzF7cLkZ0G_ec=&c=xLQrfcE9_4_ngMejlUtBj74n-P_2TnaURZbDUEbT-tthakOz0bCVeQ==&ch=Y3Tz3DXZg6FxtgZgJ34JY4P-IZQcNWQZc1hiHb0SbwMIRK4aroygFg==) next Thursday.
In addition to watching this conversation, I also want to invite you to be a part of it. Watch this video to learn more:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vuBQKCxHc7CYzkLQweyZENfParfdej62PVK1yp_OVMFs84bghyr3X17kgA_lMlIBLozA2P2Kt_txBea-usYFx36OdMN_DMDdPbZeUS_xDLKDviopwanLtwoziBzRKMqtu9ZR0BnhHcPbGvx8cPl6gw==&c=xLQrfcE9_4_ngMejlUtBj74n-P_2TnaURZbDUEbT-tthakOz0bCVeQ==&ch=Y3Tz3DXZg6FxtgZgJ34JY4P-IZQcNWQZc1hiHb0SbwMIRK4aroygFg==)
---
| If you have a question you'd like me to ask Dr. Fauci, please respond to this email with it.
This is an exciting opportunity for Rhode Islanders to hear directly from one of our nation's leading public health experts, and I hope you'll tune in.
See you Thursday,
-Gina Raimondo Governor

name: Josh Hicks
subject: Not-So-Fancy-Farm update
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Last Saturday, I was joined by nearly a dozen Democratic elected officials and candidates running for office in local elections. Here’s what they had to say.

|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18585430/233179101/215659642?refcode=FL_em_fr_20200807CampaignUpdate_JH_all_xx_xx_btest_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTM1Y2ZmYS1iZWQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w3mnWFrEen6tVWRdepjtPsIXcjLxRzmNVELmBunA0uk=)
| | Hey friends, Josh here. Every year, during the first week of August, Kentucky candidates and community members (Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike) flock to Fancy Farm, Kentucky, to officially kick off the political season. This tradition — like so many others we hold dear — was put on hold this year. But my team and I put together a safe, virtual event that honored Fancy Farm and kicked off the political season right here in the 6th Congressional District. (We appropriately called it Not-So-Fancy-Farm.) Last Saturday, I was joined by nearly a dozen Democratic elected officials and candidates running for office in local elections to provide voters and supporters the opportunity to connect directly with our campaigns — all while remaining safe and practicing social distancing. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18585431/233179110/215659642?refcode=FL_em_fr_20200807CampaignUpdate_JH_all_xx_xx_btest_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTM1Y2ZmYS1iZWQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w3mnWFrEen6tVWRdepjtPsIXcjLxRzmNVELmBunA0uk=)
---
We discussed what we need to do to win seats up and down the ballot — from the Kentucky General Assembly to Congress and the Senate. There are less than 88 days until the election, and we’re in a full sprint ahead to November 3.
Our mission? To deliver the change needed so desperately in communities across Kentucky.
I want to applaud these men and women who have chosen to answer the call of public service during this time, and to thank them for helping us have a successful event.
Though things looked different this year, I am grateful to all of you who were able to join us and be a part of this event. I — and every one of these amazing candidates — will need your help as we get closer to November.
Josh
| [**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18585432/233179111/1882163059?refcode=FL_em_fr_20200807CampaignUpdate_JH_all_xx_xx_btest_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTM1Y2ZmYS1iZWQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w3mnWFrEen6tVWRdepjtPsIXcjLxRzmNVELmBunA0uk=)
---
P.S. Although we’re laser-focused on winning and turning out voters, we can always make time for a bit of fun. Because a key part of Fancy Farm is the barbecue, I decided to let viewers in on another tradition: the Hicks Family BBQ Rub recipe! Check out the recipe card below to see the full recipe. And if you use the rub, respond to this email and let me know what you think!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18585433/233179112/-1178581253?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTM1Y2ZmYS1iZWQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w3mnWFrEen6tVWRdepjtPsIXcjLxRzmNVELmBunA0uk=&emci=3b35cffa-bed8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=3e35cffa-bed8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=15601662)

Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States

Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.

He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. name: Mike Espy
subject: The U.S. Postal Service should not be politicized
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Espy for U
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18587390/233208456/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjU2ZDcwYy1jOGQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eLKulCzm7C6BTe_eKEyqeO8RpAa9EFfncK7bjc9yndM=&emci=cf56d70c-c8d8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=d256d70c-c8d8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611)
Folks, Americans depend on the U.S. Postal Service for so much – letters, legal documents, government benefits, medication, and other packages. Despite this, the USPS is being sabotaged. The Trump administration has made it clear from the beginning that they’d like to see the federal Postal Service fail so that we can move to a privatized system. As a result, **the USPS has remained drastically underfunded** , causing staff shortages, delivery delays, and more. This is a real problem, because during this pandemic, we’re depending on the USPS more than ever before in our country’s history. That’s especially true in Mississippi, where many of our rural communities lack broadband access. In fact, our democracy in and of itself depends on the Postal Service in this year’s critical election. Countless voters across the country are relying on mail-in ballots to safely vote from home. Now the Trump administration — which has undercut the Postal Service for years — is falsely claiming that vote-by-mail isn’t safe or reliable — **a blatant attempt to suppress the vote. ** The Postal Service should not be politicized, folks, and we need it to function properly so that every American voter may safely make their voice heard in November. [**We need Congress to step up and save the USPS from all-out destruction: Add your name along mine to my petition demanding the Postal Service be fully funded and protected from this administration’s sabotage now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18587400/233208467/-370942455?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjU2ZDcwYy1jOGQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eLKulCzm7C6BTe_eKEyqeO8RpAa9EFfncK7bjc9yndM=&emci=cf56d70c-c8d8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=d256d70c-c8d8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18587404/233208469/-370942455?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjU2ZDcwYy1jOGQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eLKulCzm7C6BTe_eKEyqeO8RpAa9EFfncK7bjc9yndM=&emci=cf56d70c-c8d8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=d256d70c-c8d8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611)

An attack on the postal service is an attack on voting rights. Let’s fight back before it’s too late.
– Mike

body:
Did you see this message from our team? According to his own words, Vern Buchanan believes 12 years is long enough to stay in office. But, once again, Buchanan says one thing to get elected and then does another. But, now we have the opportunity to make him keep his word.

Friend,

Did you see this message from our team?

According to his own words, Vern Buchanan believes 12 years is long enough to stay in office. But, once again, Buchanan says one thing to get elected and then does another. But, now we have the opportunity to make him keep his word.

Vern said that twelve years should be the maximum amount of time someone should be in Congress, but now, almost FOURTEEN years later, he has changed his tune and is seeking yet another term past his own self-imposed limit.

**The people of the Suncoast deserve a representative who does what they say they will do — not someone who will say anything to get elected and then go back on his promises, like Vern Buchanan has.**

Click on this secure link to contribute what you can right now to help power our campaign to hold Vern to his word, and defeat him in this critical election: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/margaretgoodfl16](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18588092/233222147/1073285021?refcode2=186186ee-cbd8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emci=0225f087-d5d5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=186186ee-cbd8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&refcode=080720-es-term-limits-kicker-no&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODYxODZlZS1jYmQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QmVRdyygpCqEoHUtYp0Z7ckE2q88-HmeV7TpgivQ8k=)**

Alex Koren

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Team Good**
Date: Thu, Aug 6, 2020 at 9:35 AM
Subject: fourteen years ago

Friend,

Whether it’s protecting Social Security and Medicare, lowering drug prices, or protecting our environment, Vern Buchanan says one thing and does the opposite.

**Almost FOURTEEN years ago, Vern even advocated for TWELVE year term limits for members of Congress. Guess what? He’s overstayed his welcome. name: Bill Hagerty
subject: We couldn't have done it without you Peter
body:
We just won the primary!
Peter,**We did it. **Tonight, we won Tennessee's Republican Senate Primary!First of all, I want to thank you. I'm honored and humbled to have the support of so many Christian conservatives across our great state. I also want to thank my Lord and Savior - through Him all things are possible.I'm also grateful for the support of President Trump, Vice President Pence, Senator Blackburn and so many conservatives who agree that we need more Trump conservatives in the United States Senate. Now more than ever, we need strong conservative Senators who will not kowtow to the angry liberal mob that is tearing apart the fabric of the America we love. President Trump won't stand for it, and neither will I.If I have your support, I hope you'll [**donate and help us win in November.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phhkkdy-fuutjhhtj-r/) [DONATE $25 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phhkkdy-fuutjhhtj-y/) [DONATE $50 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phhkkdy-fuutjhhtj-j/) [DONATE $100 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phhkkdy-fuutjhhtj-t/) [DONATE $250 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phhkkdy-fuutjhhtj-i/) In the Senate, I will stand with President Trump and Senator Blackburn to support our law enforcement officers, defend the right to life by defunding Planned Parenthood, confirm constitutionalist judges and protect our Tennessee conservative values.**Again, I am humbled by your strong support and I will continue to fight every day to be your United States Senator.** If you can, [**please chip-in and help us win the General Election.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phhkkdy-fuutjhhtj-d/) Thank you for your support.Bill HagertyRepublican nominee for U.S. Senate (R-TN) | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phhkkdy-fuutjhhtj-u/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phhkkdy-fuutjhhtj-o/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phhkkdy-fuutjhhtj-b/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phhkkdy-fuutjhhtj-n/)
---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
4515 Harding Pike
Suite 110
Nashville, TN 37205
[Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-phhkkdy-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-p) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-u-phhkkdy-fuutjhhtj-x/)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Are the polls accurate?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away_retarget&n=1)
---
Peter \-- 82% of Minnesotans approved of Walz' handling of the coronavirus in May. By June, that number fell to 64%. In July??? Well, the pollsters took the month off apparently. That's because more and more Minnesotans are waking up to the scam of Walz using indefinite powers when there is no longer an emergency. **We're now less than one week away from Tyrant-in-the-Making Walz extending his emergency powers for the sixth month in a row. If you've lost count, we're on Day 147 of slowing the spread.** Since this whole thing started, we've seen our favorite restaurants and businesses get shut down by one person calling all the shots. In some cases, life dreams were crushed as the shutdown led to business owners having to close their doors permanently. Now one person is mandating that all citizens wear a mask when in public. Even though there's a law on the books that prohibits the wearing of face coverings. One thing is for sure: Governor Walz and Democrats hate democracy and prefer a system of government where one person makes all the rules. Well, as long as its their own "benevolent" dictator that is. That's why Action 4 Liberty has led the effort against Governor Walz' Unilateral Emergency Powers since **Day 1**. **Here's a Recap of our Efforts:**
* **April 14 - only 15 Republicans voted with us**
* **April 28 - after weeks of pressuring House Republicans, we got all 59 to vote with us**
* **June 13 - after pressuring the Senate Republicans, we got them to pass the Resolution and we got 61 votes in the House with 2 Democrats**
* **July 14 - we got 63 votes in the House with 4 Democrats joining us**

Remember, we need 68 votes on the Resolution in the Minnesota House to finally End Walz' Powers. **So, we're merely FIVE DEMOCRATS AWAY from ending Walz' emergency powers once and for all!** It's time we **turn up the heat**! Action 4 Liberty has started a multifaceted campaign against targeted Democrats to force them to vote the right way...or else suffer in November's election. We're employing digital ads, mailers, phone calls, emails, and even this commercial in their districts: [](http://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_tabke_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away_retarget&n=2) We also sent your signed petition to these targeted Democrats so they know that their voters want to End Walz' Powers NOW! Walz has completely abused his emergency powers to infringe on our civil liberties and shut down our favorite businesses. **Governor Walz is power hungry. Allowing one person to make rules that govern free people is the most un-American ideal that exists. He MUST BE STOPPED!** We're putting a lot of money into these targeted districts and are close to hitting our total budget to put **MAXIMUM HEAT**!
## We're Only $2,000 Away >From Hitting Our Budget
## [PLEASE HELP US GET THERE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away_retarget&n=3)
The Legislature will be back in session in one week and we can't afford to not put**maximum pressure** on the remaining Democrats needed to End Walz' Emergency Powers. We have a shot at finally stopping Walz in his tracks! Help us get these commercials out to tens of thousands of voters in these districts by donating today. If **20 people gave $100** , we'd hit our objective immediately. Can you help with that? | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away_retarget&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away_retarget&n=5)
---
We must **turn up the heat** on these Democrats to stop protecting Walz! Who knows what next week has in store for our suffering state under Walz' failed leadership.
[**Only with your support of funding these commercials, other cutting edge digitals, mail and all your activism can we make this a reality. Pitch in $100 NOW if you can. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or get us a lot of air play with a generous donation of $1,000.**](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away_retarget&n=6)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away_retarget&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away_retarget&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away_retarget&n=9), software for leaders.

Walz has completely abused his emergency powers to infringe on our civil liberties and shut down our favorite businesses. Governor Walz is power hungry. Allowing one person to make rules that govern free people is the most un-American ideal that exists. He MUST BE STOPPED! We're putting a lot of money into these targeted districts and are close to hitting our total budget to put MAXIMUM HEAT! We're Only $2,000 Away >From Hitting Our Budget The Legislature will be back in session in one week and we can't afford to not putmaximum pressure on the remaining Democrats needed to End Walz' Emergency Powers. We have a shot at finally stopping Walz in his tracks! Help us get these commercials out to tens of thousands of voters in these districts by donating today. If 20 people gave $100 , we'd hit our objective immediately. Can you help with that? | "DONATE" We must turn up the heat on these Democrats to stop protecting Walz! Who knows what next week has in store for our suffering state under Walz' failed leadership. In Liberty, Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty Action 4 Liberty · United States

name: Jon Ossoff (personal)
subject: Friend, we can solve these problems
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
There's so much at stake on November 3. |
---
Friend,

**We have witnessed a catastrophic failure by the U.S. government to respond to this pandemic.**

There can be no doubt that the quality of our political leadership is a matter of life and death. So much depends on victory in November.

**Friend, the problems that need solving aren't mysterious. The solutions aren't either.**

For example: My state of Georgia faced a health care crisis even before COVID-19. 1.5 million without insurance. Families having to choose between medicine and housing. Half our counties with no OB-GYN. Sky-high maternal mortality. Rural hospitals closing.

It's no mystery how to solve these problems.

_Lawmakers could expand Medicaid, put a stop to insurance and drug companies' price gouging, build new clinics, and hire more health care workers._

**But right now, with corruption and self-dealing rampant in Washington, the priorities of politicians are not the same as the American people who send them there.**

_They rubber-stamp billions for big business, but can't come together to renew an extra $600 in unemployment benefits for ordinary Americans._

**Making health care affordable for all, breaking the link between health and wealth, ending Washington corruption, rebuilding our economy so it creates wealth for working people ... it's all possible. But it takes leadership.**

**[Friend, in the Senate I will fight to solve these problems for my constituents. I'll stand up to corporate PACs and lobbyists. I'll answer questions and criticism in public like any public servant should. If you agree that's what we need now more than ever, please chip in $20 to help me win.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e277a/5b2c1286/3e9bfeb2/25f1d541/2558529075/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_07_jo_mo_ahead?refcode=em_2020_08_07_jo_mo_ahead&amount=20")**

subject: Flip this seat from red to blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3bff0ca7b676/flip-this-seat-from-red-to-blue?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Dani Brzozowski, my friend and Democratic nominee for Congress in IL-16, is running an inspiring campaign against a pro-Trump, ultra-conservative Congressman. I need your help to make sure she wins and expands our Democratic majority in the House. **The people of IL-16 deserve somebody who will fight for working families, and Dani will do just that.** I know that I can count on Dani to partner with me to fight for our shared values, and together we will fight for Veteran’s issues, lower healthcare costs, and bring good-paying jobs to Illinois. **I need more partners like Dani in Washington**. **[Can you join me in supporting her with a donation?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=75805f0ea9&e=140a9b81e7)** Dani has momentum right now, and the data shows us that we have an opportunity to make history in IL-16 this November by electing her to Congress. Because of this, her opponent and his deep-pocketed, special interest donors are doing everything they can to silence her message by pouring in outside money. **Your contribution to Dani’s campaign will help her fight back against dishonest NRA and Wall Street-funded attacks, and lead her to victory. ** We need Dani in Congress, and she needs you to get her there. [Chip in today, and let's flip this seat from red to blue together. ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=e09139d3ac&e=140a9b81e7) Tammy Duckworth United States Senator from Illinois

Medicare for All. The Green New Deal. Universal child care. A $15 minimum wage. Criminal justice reform. Student debt relief and tuition-free public college. Mondaire will fight as hard as he can for these progressive priorities, and that’s part of why I’m so excited to join this team. These policies would radically improve the lives of working people and help create a more just and equitable society. Our district and our country are ready for a new generation of political leadership — one that represents bold progressivism and fights for the needs of working people over the one percent. **[I couldn’t be more excited to help send Mondaire to Congress — are you with me? clean_body: Medicare for All. The Green New Deal. Universal child care. | | | Hi there, Nice to meet you! I’m Hannah Nayowith — Mondaire’s new Campaign Manager. I couldn’t be more excited to join Team Mondaire and help him make history this Election Day. Mondaire is exactly the kind of leader we need more of in this country — someone who knows firsthand the struggles that working people face. I’m proud to be on Team Mondaire because he’s running to help build an America where working people can thrive, not just survive. Medicare for All. The Green New Deal. Universal child care. A $15 minimum wage. Criminal justice reform. Student debt relief and tuition-free public college. Mondaire will fight as hard as he can for these progressive priorities, and that’s part of why I’m so excited to join this team. These policies would radically improve the lives of working people and help create a more just and equitable society. Our district and our country are ready for a new generation of political leadership — one that represents bold progressivism and fights for the needs of working people over the one percent. Thank you for being a part of our movement. It means so much to me to have you on board. All my best, Hannah Nayowith Campaign Manager | | Sent via . name: MJ Hegar HQ
subject: You have two choices, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
A spineless bootlicker or a badass veteran?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e74/7f51f7bc/40f0dd3f/4ef78153/4227343745/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter -- you have two choices: **[Option 1: You pitch in to help MJ win this election.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e74/7f51f7bc/40f0dd3f/4ef78152/4227343745/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200807.1nd__1865__&amount=10")**
If you choose this option, we'll be able to get our message to undecided voters across Texas. We'll be able to reach voters who care about America and about having a senator who gives a damn about them. **On November 3rd, MJ wins!** She goes to Washington to lead a new era of progress on health care, climate change, and much more.

**Option 2: You decide not to donate, hoping that somebody else will.**
You assume that other people will step up, but everyone else assumes the same thing. Senator Cornyn reaches the undecided voters we need first, and we don't have the resources to convince them to turn out for MJ. **He wins reelection and spends another six years working against regular Texans.** | [MAKE THE RIGHT CHOICE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e74/7f51f7bc/40f0dd3f/4ef78152/4227343745/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200807.1nd__1865__&amount=10")
---
Look, Peter, we can win this election if we each give everything we can -- whether that's time, donations, or support. No one wants to think they could have done more to defeat Sen. Cornyn -- and that's why we're laying out your options so starkly.

MJ is relying on you. **Will you have her back and make sure we win in November?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: ACTION NEEDED (via protectvoting.org)
subject: We're witnessing authoritarianism in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d035d/72412298/4b23f11c/61067590/1531755709/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200807_AuthoritarianismJA_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200807_AuthoritarianismJA_U1_X1")

| | What we saw unfold in Portland is completely unacceptable. Federal agents invading the city and grabbing people off the streets and putting them into unmarked vehicles -- _this is authoritarianism at its finest._ **And if it can happen in Portland -- it can happen ANYWHERE in America.** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d035d/72412298/4b23f11c/61067593/1531755709/VEsE/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/trump-authoritarianism/voter-protection-project/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200807_AuthoritarianismJA_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200807_AuthoritarianismJA_U1_X1") Our President's power is _OUT OF CONTROL_. He must be stopped NOW! **We 're calling on Congress to act by blocking President Trump from sending these agents into cities to attack and kidnap protestors. [Will you join 12,000 of our other supporters in calling on Congress to block the President's actions now?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d035d/72412298/4b23f11c/61067592/1531755709/VEsF/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/trump-authoritarianism/voter-protection-project/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+join+12000+of+our+other+support&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200807_AuthoritarianismJA_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200807_AuthoritarianismJA_U1_X1")** | | | [Call on Congress to Block Trump NOW! >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d035d/72412298/4b23f11c/61067595/1531755709/VEsC/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/trump-authoritarianism/voter-protection-project/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Call+on+Congress+to+Block+Trump+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200807_AuthoritarianismJA_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200807_AuthoritarianismJA_U1_X1")
---
This is the United States of America -- a nation founded on democratic principles, like the right to protest and the right to speak truth to power.
_If our President is able to send to federal agents to kidnap his adversaries -- we are no longer a democracy._**Point blank.**
**We 're joining thousands of concerned Americans calling on Congress to stop President Trump's deployment of federal agents into our communities.** _Every Democrat must ACT now -- our democracy is on the line today._
**[Will you join us in demanding Congress act now to prevent the President from abusing his office to silence his vocal opposition?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d035d/72412298/4b23f11c/61067594/1531755709/VEsD/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/trump-authoritarianism/voter-protection-project/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Will+you+join+us+in+demanding+Congress+a&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200807_AuthoritarianismJA_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200807_AuthoritarianismJA_U1_X1")**
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d035d/72412298/4b23f11c/61067597/1531755709/VEsA/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/trump-authoritarianism/voter-protection-project/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200807_AuthoritarianismJA_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200807_AuthoritarianismJA_U1_X1")
We're counting on you using your voice to speak out today.
We can stop him, together,
\-- the Voter Protection Project

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d035d/72412298/4b23f11c/61067596/1531755709/VEsB/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200807_AuthoritarianismJA_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200807_AuthoritarianismJA_U1_X1")

body:
For about the price of a cup of coffee, we believe you can help defend our democracy. |

Peter,

Each day we make choices with our time and money to show we care and to stand up for what we believe. And when times are tough, these choices matter more than ever.

We know that now is not an easy time to donate to a political campaign, and there are so many causes that deserve your attention right now. That's why we at Team Biden have a question for you, Peter: How much do you spend on coffee? Or tea?

We're asking because, for about the price of a cup of coffee, we believe you can help defend our democracy.

When you contribute to our campaign, you help us reach voters across the country and share Joe Biden's message for a better future for all of us.

Peter, as this election gets closer, anything, even $3 from a supporter like you, could be the edge we need to win this fight for the soul of our nation.

[**So we're asking you to make your first contribution to elect Joe Biden today, for about the same price as a cup of Joe, to help us defend our democracy from Donald Trump this November. Will you chip in just $3 today?**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_august_nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.07_B1_cuppajoe_X__F1_S2_C2__nd-full_t2&amount=3&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.07_B1_cuppajoe_X__F1_S2_C2__nd-full_t2") | ******Biden for President Supporter Record for Peter Willis******

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bac6/1cd0ac28/17d4f5e58/357eaf43/2035396879/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bac6/1cd0ac28/17d4f5e58/357eaf40/2035396879/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

Eugene is a fighter with a proven track record of bringing accountability and transparency to government to make the lives of hard-working Pennsylvania families better. As PA’s Auditor General, he nearly eliminated the backlog of rape kits, protected children from abuse, and saved taxpayers millions of dollars by taking on wasteful spending.

Friend, justice is on the ballot this November. And we can restore justice to our democratic systems by fighting to hold those in power accountable and for transparency at all levels of government. **There is no doubt in my mind that Eugene is the best person to stand on the side of justice for South Central Pennsylvanians.**

But special interest groups have made PA-10 one of their top priorities in this election, already dedicating _over a million dollars_ to influence this race. Eugene is counting on grassroots supporters like you to fight back against their influence and help flip this seat blue.

[**I hope you will join me in supporting Eugene today by making a contribution of any size, even just a few dollars, to help elect him to Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18591658/233287915/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.07_b1_kh_all-nd&refcode2=df2b37d7-e4d8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjJiMzdkNy1lNGQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jL3rORjsj1ersRCxYqQ-4-juuAhNDP9io8gRFbS1l6s=) [Donate Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18591659/233287916/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.07_b1_kh_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjJiMzdkNy1lNGQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jL3rORjsj1ersRCxYqQ-4-juuAhNDP9io8gRFbS1l6s=)

name: Jay Inslee
subject: I'm joining Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer on Zoom -- can you join, too?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
She's led Michigan with guts, grit, and grace.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8117%2E868730%2Ewc3oh5) _We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=4&akid=8117%2E868730%2Ewc3oh5)** Thanks, and take care._ Friend, Donald Trump called me a "nasty person," and he called Governor Gretchen Whitmer "that woman from Michigan." We have a lot in common -- so I'm thinking we'll have a lot to talk about. **[I'm excited to join Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer on Zoom next Thursday, August 13th, at 5:30 p.m. ET / 2:30 p.m. PT -- donate $15 or whatever feels right to you, and you can join us!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10348?t=5&akid=8117%2E868730%2Ewc3oh5)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$15 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10411?t=6&akid=8117%2E868730%2Ewc3oh5)
---
| | [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10351?t=7&akid=8117%2E868730%2Ewc3oh5)
---
| [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10352?t=8&akid=8117%2E868730%2Ewc3oh5)
---
| | [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10353?t=9&akid=8117%2E868730%2Ewc3oh5)
---
| [$250 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10374?t=10&akid=8117%2E868730%2Ewc3oh5)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10348?t=11&akid=8117%2E868730%2Ewc3oh5)
---
Both Governor Whitmer and I know all too well how important state leadership is right now and how much that leadership is under attack if it doesn't fall in line with what Donald Trump wants.
We both made hard choices during the height of the COVID-19 pandemic this spring that saved lives but were immediately and publicly criticized by President Trump on Twitter and on TV -- but we've both seen that those actions made all the difference to millions of people in our own states.
And that's just part of a long history of Gretchen fighting to put people first, not politics. She's a mom, former state legislator, prosecutor, and current governor -- so she's really seen and done it all, and she's led her state with guts, grit, and grace. I can't wait to catch up over Zoom -- I hope you can join us.
**[RSVP to join Governor Whitmer and I on Zoom next Thursday, August 13th, at 5:30 p.m. ET / 2:30 p.m. PT by donating $15 or whatever feels right to you right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10348?t=12&akid=8117%2E868730%2Ewc3oh5)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10348?t=13&akid=8117%2E868730%2Ewc3oh5)

clean_body: She's led Michigan with guts, grit, and grace. | We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now, Thanks, and take care. Friend, Donald Trump called me a "nasty person," and he called Governor Gretchen Whitmer "that woman from Michigan." We have a lot in common -- so I'm thinking we'll have a lot to talk about. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Both Governor Whitmer and I know all too well how important state leadership is right now and how much that leadership is under attack if it doesn't fall in line with what Donald Trump wants. We both made hard choices during the height of the COVID-19 pandemic this spring that saved lives but were immediately and publicly criticized by President Trump on Twitter and on TV -- but we've both seen that those actions made all the difference to millions of people in our own states. And that's just part of a long history of Gretchen fighting to put people first, not politics. She's a mom, former state legislator, prosecutor, and current governor -- so she's really seen and done it all, and she's led her state with guts, grit, and grace. I can't wait to catch up over Zoom -- I hope you can join us. Very truly yours, Jay

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Second Amendment Update for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
The New York Attorney General is suing to shut down the National Rifle Association. The NRA is made up of millions of law-abiding citizens who use firearms responsibly. This action is a direct assault on every law-abiding gun owner and freedom loving American. We cannot allow them to get away with it.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNDMyOTcS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDU3MDA4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

**First** , the radical Left releases violent criminals out of jail and allows rioting and anarchy in our streets.

**Then** , they call to defund the police, so we have no protection against the violent anarchists burning down buildings and looting our stores.

**Now** , they're coming for our guns so we can't protect ourselves from the chaos they caused.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNDMyOTcS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDU3MDA4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

The New York Attorney General is suing to shut down the National Rifle Association. The NRA is made up of millions of law-abiding citizens who use firearms responsibly.

_This action is a direct assault on every law-abiding gun owner and freedom loving American._

**We cannot allow them to get away with it.**

[**Defend the Second Amendment -- Donate NOW**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNDMyOTcS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDU3MDA4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter, just imagine if Joe Biden wins the White House and Democrats win the House and Senate. Joe Biden is too confused and incompetent to govern, so the far left will be pulling all of the strings. [**One of their first targets will be rolling back the Second Amendment and taking our guns.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNDMyOTcS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDU3MDA4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

The violence, the defunding of the police, and now the targeting of the NRA is all part of their plan to fundamentally change the fabric of our country.

[**Defend the Second Amendment -- Donate NOW**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNDMyOTcS1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDU3MDA4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

I have fought for this country in uniform and I care deeply about the future we leave for our children and grandchildren.

I will continue to fight everyday against these radical plans to roll back the Second Amendment and take away our guns.

If you stand with me, I am asking you to make whatever contribution you can afford to help [**Defend the Second Amendment**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNDMyOTcS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDU3MDA4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0).

name: Harold Mitchell Jr.
subject: Joe Biden, Jay Inslee, and I agree. Do you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Some great news inside.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=1892%2E53494%2EE-a_os) Friend, Growing up in Spartanburg, South Carolina -- a predominantly Black community where the EPA designated two severely contaminated Superfund sites and four Brownfield sites -- I knew many in the community and from my personal family experience who experienced rare illnesses and died. But rather than try to get out of Spartanburg, I dedicated my life to making it a better place to live. In 1997, I founded the ReGenesis Community Development Corporation to confront environmental injustices in my community. And since then, we've leveraged millions to clean up contaminated Brownfield and Superfund sites, created job training initiatives to construct new affordable, energy efficient housing, and brought health care to a medically underserved community. Our work is proof that economic investments transform communities when they prioritize environmental justice. [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/674?t=3&akid=1892%2E53494%2EE-a_os) **That is why when Jay Inslee visited my hometown last spring, I was thrilled to see someone on the national stage committed to frontline communities like Spartanburg.** And my excitement for electing a climate president has not diminished: It's why I joined Evergreen's advisory board and why I helped Joe Biden put together his plan for environmental justice. The great news is that Joe Biden's newly released plan for environmental justice delivers, prioritizing 40% of federal green investments targeted to support disadvantaged communities. This is a huge commitment for our communities within a $2 trillion plan. Investments like these will go straight to Spartanburg and other communities like mine across the country. It's a powerful first step toward rebuilding communities hit first and worst by climate change. This plan will create countless good jobs that make communities like Spartanburg direct participants in cutting edge solutions to immense problems climate change created and/or exacerbated. I know how important Biden's plan is because I've seen it happen in my own community. **Joe Biden, Jay Inslee, and I agree that there can be no solution to climate change without environmental justice. Do you?** **[Sign on to affirm that any climate plan -- put through the House, the Senate, or the White House -- must center environmental justice.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/674?t=4&akid=1892%2E53494%2EE-a_os)** | [ADD YOUR VOICE ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/674?t=5&akid=1892%2E53494%2EE-a_os)
---
Thanks for your support,
Harold Mitchell Jr.
Founder, ReGenesis
Advisory Board Member, Evergreen Action

---

We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to remove yourself from our list, click . = | | The results are in from our Campaign Focus Group. Thank you so much for giving us your input — we’re only as good as our grassroots support! Now, we’re analyzing your input and incorporating it into our campaign plan going forward. Take a look at what our grassroots supporters think will help us win in November: Best methods for getting Mike’s message in front of voters before Election Day: “Have volunteers send postcards” - Jerry T. “Direct mail” - Sari S. What our supporters committed to doing to help us win this year: “Donate to a campaign or cause” - Kirk L. “Talk with our friends and neighbors about voting” - Tara C. Now that we’ve got a pulse on our best strategies, we need the resources to carry them out! We put together a revised media plan and we want to expose Michael McCaul’s true priorities to voters. That’s why we’ve set a goal of raising $15,000 in the next 24 hours to start funding our revised strategy. name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: quick question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

In less than 67 days, Texans will be headed to early voting polls to determine the future of TX-22 -- and our country . And the stakes of this election couldn’t be higher. We have a real shot at flipping Texas blue and sending true representation to fight for the change our country needs -- and that starts right here in TX-22.

Can I count on your vote this election?

I'm ready to vote! » https://secure.ngpvan.com/B8ymPTnNZ0ibn8CeUlMOhg2

Our district is at a crossroads, friend: We have a choice between the kind of change our communities desperately need and the continuation of the hate and division that has plagued our country. I’m running for Congress to fight for the issues at stake in our community and our country -- and we have a shot at winning. But to win, we need to count you in the fight. Can I count on you to join our team this election?

Count me in! » https://secure.ngpvan.com/B8ymPTnNZ0ibn8CeUlMOhg2

Let's get it done!
Sri

Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_eng_2020.08.07_s_b1_all&amount=25

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.
Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_eng_2020.08.07_s_b1_all&amount=25
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at sri2020.com [https://sri2020.com/]
Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/57a8dfae-ded8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb/a7a884d1-e9d8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2E4ODRkMS1lOWQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B-7XDVyQZ-QhqscOxlT89EOEV03FHlH-w69jIVRoarw=&id=117373579 .

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: New WSJ OpEd: The Biden Bait-and-Switch
body:
[ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=e77b3a9d8ba840099be13a7ba01e4fe2&_e=eO5sncwemggGDWyAjltXmE_0pTN9ZO0bN3XqxnGRV71txmR-7aLFx2fzU9NJ5gLruqhU6gCE2V6thYY06sCIgEFcmfc7dAS_sRnned7ED4lWuH_Im7j0UxFJGsKpU7820C4HDgTVolw3aMi33NC6bluEwoj21W0OXV_WU0OiTPlTyE9jXpwlpffAnhcBymgSGoBKKYQBEzee75mjfqGoQH7Ym63ZhmZz_UnW8aT-R5LYbllJeWUyDGtuVPFevJ4c) I hope you had a chance to read my latest article in the Wall Street Journal, "[The Biden Bait-and-Switch](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=e77b3a9d8ba840099be13a7ba01e4fe2&_e=ESGjjJXUkItDTES_zPLF6AqRKysKduCbwU8ZWVPgJBPHGNvcP_zTfFiozUvhqMGer3hcCtrlyO1HMU0VwLTbZ9uBVAUI99mzp_rF0YxnGBbx0OeFCLKVqC1yAqzChr5Ml_-AmjlZIJ2kZTi_dLnOYyYt6Z9Xjlm5KZlxNKE4d_EiqDZZtaGQ_EVglq9foq03N6SXOPHd2PxGOjuEM3teGDzADa7sgUh3sauqIl_cg2STyXwfP6I3o-90oOJida5tEB-dh3XXpFHbcowq5f7lYirzXR_mGtuH-SuoPNqEEmXgZyVVm07FOniKEur-eOyGBejD_wlgX9tUuz22SjIH4YC8fpPuFSg1vJJI1rk0arA%3D)." The media portrays Uncle Joe as a familiar face, reliable statesman, and known quantity in contrast with the volatile Mr. Trump. In reality, he promises to be the most liberal president in history. Voters seeking a return to normalcy would get a radical new future instead. [READ THE FULL ARTICLE](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=e77b3a9d8ba840099be13a7ba01e4fe2&_e=ESGjjJXUkItDTES_zPLF6AqRKysKduCbwU8ZWVPgJBPHGNvcP_zTfFiozUvhqMGer3hcCtrlyO1HMU0VwLTbZ9uBVAUI99mzp_rF0YxnGBbx0OeFCLKVqC1yAqzChr5MnlXG_yPfOgmToRHE6rH2ZMv58q-KukMiOCumhGupdo2svi00I9KT9rhaxO7JR6Gvzpg6ImG0vPbMP1gqFzZuWqoJSFdc6dV5Vn5SK9TUckkqvCnthqgdDMI_aKNC0uX5WCwdNCZ2QfBLSvDnN1YgWNSx5kcfUzDIrB2A9fY-LLYWb4rDNUcrlJU31qy0O8Czmngr2yXK7uETMjyiGETD1AUzzehJr9IutE4TFKRh2ZU%3D) Sincerely, Bobby Jindal Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by America Next PO Box 320966, Alexandria, VA 22320 [Click here to unsubscribe.](http://mail.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=e77b3a9d8ba840099be13a7ba01e4fe2&_t=DgzU2av8yiZJX1I_UI3vy0RKazbB9VhsMejIJr-1wtiVIecA9HdcCOxJ9JEnNQ5Lj8jj8CaNFjYVr8uaCdzT6Y6zZO2YiSIaS4nm7nQO-aPyRw4jTIOMNdHekxApF-DSTg_9Dj2QGGjDRCVFDW3LM9RAyZnXUIOqFWI6bol2ZBA%3D)

Peter,

I don’t know if you’ve been watching, but Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez has slowly obtained more influence and power in Congress. She’s already won her primary, and now she’s endorsing and backing other radical politicians around the country. It’s even more worrying when you realize that this is her list of demands for the next session of Congress.

__**AOC’s List of Socialist Demands**__

_☭ She wants to “Defund the Police” and **ABOLISH** the NYPD!_
_☭ She wants to **CANCEL RENT** and allow rioters to destroy private property. _
_☭ She wants to take away your private healthcare and force you into a government-controlled healthcare system!_
_☭ She wants to abolish ICE, and allow MS-13 criminals to cause **CHAOS** in NYC!_
[**Defend Long Island**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=24db3f759afa4ee7b1871e06083c3664&_e=IjbpOBsFEwOamfYQ5PHIjOsNEKV7oPX-oIYSwofM-7gV_hZ6sIyWDFp08Rm5M7wniWIP4ZuvzcDxlokPnzLMJ76bEB8rIYdDzlNqSjAlHKg4H1d7iE2sBjUwDjbQjKz5es8POd7LUXLDAL0BHZJvUdkpa7fr6uhJMjNSydGmCWmW4RBuxxC_KLk9lOMLJXqqYKlr9xuerUtEWQ4gWOv2w35xT1DYNQyM3bXaFmsJ9BKGUBpgksEXOOy_460lLlsTfnP9Q2H-5MyTiFPsb-ps7_KDtNPpwTEj1MpBsm2EdDpSuuUsRNROxf2AV_VLQyD2BQlVLzg80EVj2r4XFD7ATGpFhyDleeSSY9KxS_GJjOWWwMaG9QwCA9VDmPazvuj9I3Xa5lFa49xRhkSKafkSk3Kb92Ce1htQZYwg6HBRTpTLQOLVsgYGoHOM82kTxgHL)
Peter, New York needs a national voice who will challenge and shutdown each of her socialist demands! **We can’t allow her radical policies to speak for New York any longer!**

AOC is out of touch with the New York spirit, which values **entrepreneurship** , **hard work** , and **grit** , that has made New York the jewel of the world.

**We need to take a stand and show we will not let AOC continue to spread her socialism across New York![Will you take a stand now and help me defend Long Island this November?](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=24db3f759afa4ee7b1871e06083c3664&_e=IjbpOBsFEwOamfYQ5PHIjOsNEKV7oPX-oIYSwofM-7gV_hZ6sIyWDFp08Rm5M7wniWIP4ZuvzcDxlokPnzLMJ76bEB8rIYdDzlNqSjAlHKg4H1d7iE2sBjUwDjbQjKz5es8POd7LUXLDAL0BHZJvUdkpa7fr6uhJMjNSydGmCWmW4RBuxxC_KLk9lOMLJXqqYKlr9xuerUtEWQ4gWOv2wykniAicjOWqQpXKgdXVeNWb4UothkM0DVaWlyxVxp7F9VZp0-R-TVp1IIZ3JwdudIFkrYMw0Z2JCFHzxgMsWKruXRl-HhcdfWd6mgd8L6KtQV8y0mtqIaixrX9uJ55uESGvZOcLTgrw0LeqT9n-yNhdSLFP-7I8rDXQJhFVmNvEaiirwV8bW4HzjlI1sfOVJhXIZsJ9svlbxhjXb0LuJenCvYHLJwUvwMOnB06gBX5n)**
[**Defend Long Island**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=24db3f759afa4ee7b1871e06083c3664&_e=IjbpOBsFEwOamfYQ5PHIjOsNEKV7oPX-oIYSwofM-7gV_hZ6sIyWDFp08Rm5M7wniWIP4ZuvzcDxlokPnzLMJ76bEB8rIYdDzlNqSjAlHKg4H1d7iE2sBjUwDjbQjKz5es8POd7LUXLDAL0BHZJvUdkpa7fr6uhJMjNSydGmCWmW4RBuxxC_KLk9lOMLJXqqYKlr9xuerUtEWQ4gWOv2wx_OkjvKb4JewYi0gRan7kjsaH-ggvE-GpmfRSYD8zuS1Qk6VQrX-xnrXZnsyDW18TUq1RIv48wwPVsx2_jMJLRimEZ59GVu9zihGRXHTcmVXUE2wLEOonZVg-oAyktUgIZLSIgO_O0hWIiTwdTJXN99cL7reUNAzezwbP5xMBgdmw37QzR-2RkMXSmSVE0TUB5CNWzwdMaanOUxksoK_6FEl5wZPqU-zLi_WUw_l4XZ)
If you help send me to Congress I will let AOC know that:
* _We will not let New York City or Long Island fall to socialism!_
* _We will not stand for her attacks against the NYPD!_
* _We will not let the mob destroy our businesses!_

**Peter, we need New York to come together and send AOC this message >>[“We will not let NY fall to socialism!”](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=24db3f759afa4ee7b1871e06083c3664&_e=IjbpOBsFEwOamfYQ5PHIjOsNEKV7oPX-oIYSwofM-7gV_hZ6sIyWDFp08Rm5M7wniWIP4ZuvzcDxlokPnzLMJ76bEB8rIYdDzlNqSjAlHKg4H1d7iE2sBjUwDjbQjKz5es8POd7LUXLDAL0BHZJvUdkpa7fr6uhJMjNSydGmCWmW4RBuxxC_KLk9lOMLJXqqYKlr9xuerUtEWQ4gWOv2w5zcjcouVG7GGsxMSTh5JoQOoxEVdSmeRqhhse4f2Aw9nqyW0HTr-2l4pBR8U3v0U6ux50FDoQDjDvTxds0bmpPUHI0JUXJqQBLyPPKLCtuxmaNFak6aigQKAXglIiNTYsSwJwU64tGrOWLHbqHppzFlvZto1gaZicgFuUi52wUsYRQF5jsKlayPAMUKGX7LCdAakfMYBNG0ABmAAsFMkNOuYrNNmRHrUx3dTNktJ85i)**

Thank you,
Andrew Garbarino
[**Defend Long Island**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=24db3f759afa4ee7b1871e06083c3664&_e=IjbpOBsFEwOamfYQ5PHIjOsNEKV7oPX-oIYSwofM-7gV_hZ6sIyWDFp08Rm5M7wniWIP4ZuvzcDxlokPnzLMJ76bEB8rIYdDzlNqSjAlHKg4H1d7iE2sBjUwDjbQjKz5es8POd7LUXLDAL0BHZJvUdkpa7fr6uhJMjNSydGmCWmW4RBuxxC_KLk9lOMLJXqqYKlr9xuerUtEWQ4gWOv2w9cEqFJOscdf1BPtALhWABxRdUgPLy4JlDMNzq1E7tL8KVTJZYkVH6nQSlNpEJmr4schu9JScXphZTALcmd6ANH0AuP-OjX2TEBOhBdQJCAYOb057ytVT0nbJOSiKEZ4vGG3lmmAgep2_l17rU8Q6JC9vecL6ZEtVA-9OIonHqqidBpDGe0-JlATWE7bpRAcd_waI4IMD1iNBpN04OV1ISK8_HHY3f9jZxf410aK2Azz)

| | This is BIG, Derek: now that Mark Warner's opponent has secured the GOP nomination, **the Republican Party of Virginia is officially calling the Commonwealth a "swing state."**

They're determined to roll back the progress we've made in Virginia by re-electing Donald Trump and replacing Mark in the Senate. With the Trump Victory Initiative and GOP donors pouring money and other resources into the Commonwealth, we're going to need all hands on deck to turn the tide and elect Democrats up and down the ballot. | [Pitch in to re-elect Mark Warner and keep Virginia blue!](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db71/53d9897e/540ab08f/1c8828ac/202366428/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-swing?refcode=20200807_f_1_nd__698__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")
---
With the President personally targeting Virginia, we have to take this seriously. In fact, right now **the Trump campaign is currently _outraising_ the Biden campaign in Virginia.**

And for Team Warner, this is personal. **Mark won his 2014 election by less than 1% -- so we're not taking anything for granted.** There are no guarantees in this race, and we're ready to put everything we have into making sure that we send Mark back to the Senate.

We need to fight for every single vote, _every single day_ from now until Election Day on November 3rd! **Will you help us keep Virginia blue?**
