name: Nick
subject: my father was a cop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc
body:
Friend, _ _ _My father served as a police officer for the LAPD._ I’ve seen firsthand what police officers go through while protecting and serving our communities and how they risk their lives every day. **I know how it feels to wait and see if a family member who serves the community is going to come home after their shift.**
**I also know that there’s always room for improvement.** There’s no doubt about that. Our communities deserve the best service possible from our law enforcement officers, and I fully believe that bad police officers must be held accountable for all of their actions.
The Democrats have called to defund the police in response to recent events. These calls have accompanied massive riots across the nation and have led to destruction, harming of police officers, and riots. **And you know what, Friend? Abigail Spanberger has been marching with these protestors who are calling to defund the police. This is insane!**
**It’s clear that we need REAL leadership in Washington to help end the violence and restore law and order. If you agree, sign our Restore Law & Order petition now!** [**Add Your Name**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=d3cc6de7da274e249b4b968e2168fff0&_e=pyzW6i05Sb2XQgozqJhIvyBGSBVHxz3dG3egHZI2MHiN77gikJcGycGKNUceOWCofuoIC1qL48du34kq_CW5--O5MmqSXyUYfZtabBZMaBq1XbSTNqImDnCHuqEJ0ch26RuGhyR-Ksvnpf6PR-41Kcj8FghWbVloALMUzo9tfl5EiE0ETBBqFdYHBacrEgHR22SypkXWRTFZsBnh4EQRvzTj2PWyM9lk23ORpP1Uz7LgPBtE4z8Er2UVH9fsx0h6SSQ3g-OQ7Cgx2qAonifUr8fveYqAPkztNPm7JNCHVRisS2ebqiDidjzX-eh2UwBDSGu-Y85Zsl3ajtNpYVODq4Ff4r034hsuEofQ2Owh7kNIkfSdf2rjSr7h5fsEHIBgzUpmNrQfw6p3GaRF8FQBHJlBXq3hSA-rEdYbKFjQFVMF8-uPu7GxA4qjPvI4oHYV) Let’s better our communities together. **[Join me in calling for the end of these riots>>>](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=d3cc6de7da274e249b4b968e2168fff0&_e=pyzW6i05Sb2XQgozqJhIvyBGSBVHxz3dG3egHZI2MHiN77gikJcGycGKNUceOWCofuoIC1qL48du34kq_CW5--O5MmqSXyUYfZtabBZMaBq1XbSTNqImDnCHuqEJ0ch26RuGhyR-Ksvnpf6PR-41Kcj8FghWbVloALMUzo9tfl5EiE0ETBBqFdYHBacrEgHRWcCmMWwrpGNR1EuSwzicRbJqLTzui6x7agT6W1MEWDVOlmB4djQEvnFDcdSN6hk1s_80oQr1jucuuK4ZrSXPN2IkbA4wcKPB17rOk_om9nABcE4FS0xWzqkjEFOocfvxNcB5GQwVHQDsCEV58jHGT54geotWQw-gEKK12-frsaGpB9SWD63Gy-qGkvv9Cju0Lc4HsnjY6U3bbKXbATJdSZ2_awM0IjDzjqsQPQjDN98VdaC5h8wBK2b4WrByCDJR)**

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Help me win a swing district
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=ihXTm7cMf3Nxmng&b=3NorppnugK1gLVWFUpa2Uw)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. **

I'm a fighter, and one of the conservative fighters I respected the most was always Herman Cain. His sudden passing saddens me beyond belief.
I had the great honor of meeting Mr. Cain a few years back when he gave the commencement speech at my son’s graduation. His speech and life story was very inspiring and motivating and proved with hard work and determination you can do anything. He was a true patriot and will be missed.
_**Herman Cain is a hero- and his American Dream is one for the history books**_. He rose from destitute poverty to become CEO of Godfather's Pizza, a radio host, a Presidential candidate, and a Chairman of a Federal Reserve Bank. He grew up in a three room house, sometimes sleeping on the floor- to parents who worked five jobs between them. He beat Stage IV cancer before he accomplished much of his biggest feats.
**_Clearly this is someone that the country should mourn. _**
But are Democrats mourning Herman Cain? No. They rejoice in his passing, in the most ghoulish fashion possible. They mock Mr. Cain and the President, such is their hatred:
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=ihXTm7cMf3Nxmng&b=3NorppnugK1gLVWFUpa2Uw)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=ihXTm7cMf3Nxmng&b=3NorppnugK1gLVWFUpa2Uw)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=ihXTm7cMf3Nxmng&b=3NorppnugK1gLVWFUpa2Uw)
---

**_We just got lectured by the far Left for 2 months about how "Black Lives Matter". They burned black-owned businesses, killed black people (including children), and destroyed black communities. _**

Now they rejoice in the death of one of the most prominent black politicians of the 21st Century.

_What can we learn from this?_

**The radical Left doesn't care who you are. They don't care where you live or your creed or race. If you disagree with them in the slightest, they will attack you and rejoice in your death. **

__Can you imagine if they took power? Do you want your family to be at the mercy of a party and a terrorist movement (Antifa) that wishes for your death?__

[If that isn't YOUR vision for America, I need your help to change Congress and evict Pelosi!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=ihXTm7cMf3Nxmng&b=3NorppnugK1gLVWFUpa2Uw)

**_I will NEVER support the radical Left. AOC and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=ihXTm7cMf3Nxmng&b=3NorppnugK1gLVWFUpa2Uw), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=ihXTm7cMf3Nxmng&b=3NorppnugK1gLVWFUpa2Uw). I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=ihXTm7cMf3Nxmng&b=3NorppnugK1gLVWFUpa2Uw)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=ihXTm7cMf3Nxmng&b=3NorppnugK1gLVWFUpa2Uw)

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I'm a fighter, and one of the conservative fighters I respected the most was always Herman Cain. His sudden passing saddens me beyond belief. I had the great honor of meeting Mr. Cain a few years back when he gave the commencement speech at my son’s graduation. His speech and life story was very inspiring and motivating and proved with hard work and determination you can do anything. He was a true patriot and will be missed. Herman Cain is a hero- and his American Dream is one for the history books. He rose from destitute poverty to become CEO of Godfather's Pizza, a radio host, a Presidential candidate, and a Chairman of a Federal Reserve Bank. He grew up in a three room house, sometimes sleeping on the floor- to parents who worked five jobs between them. He beat Stage IV cancer before he accomplished much of his biggest feats. Clearly this is someone that the country should mourn. But are Democrats mourning Herman Cain? No. They rejoice in his passing, in the most ghoulish fashion possible. They mock Mr. Cain and the President, such is their hatred: We just got lectured by the far Left for 2 months about how "Black Lives Matter". They burned black-owned businesses, killed black people (including children), and destroyed black communities. Now they rejoice in the death of one of the most prominent black politicians of the 21st Century. What can we learn from this? The radical Left doesn't care who you are. They don't care where you live or your creed or race. If you disagree with them in the slightest, they will attack you and rejoice in your death. Can you imagine if they took power? Do you want your family to be at the mercy of a party and a terrorist movement (Antifa) that wishes for your death? I will NEVER support the radical Left. AOC and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand! , with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I . I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this! For God and Country, Sandy Smith Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District Conservative Entrepreneur & Military mom P.S. I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield. PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC P.O. Box 434 Winterville NC 28590 USA |

name: Team Messner
subject: This Week: New TV Ad, North Country Tour, helping NH Republicans, and more
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e8d645d1abbcb2ce/77d0d9a3da1b5ac2c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Volunteer](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e8d645d1abbcb2ce/d7556c946e50462ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Third TV Ad Focuses on the Messner USA Plan**
Our third **[television ad](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e8d645d1abbcb2ce/9aadb37a41d73a6ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)** focuses on the Messner USA Plan, a blueprint to restore America’s economic prosperity and manufacturing might, preserve individual liberties, and reduce government intrusion and over-regulation.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e8d645d1abbcb2ce/49d49a58c176b0f4c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
_The USA Plan: Unleashing the Strength of America_ focuses on three main areas: economic freedom, national security, and individual liberty.

The **[new 30-second spot](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e8d645d1abbcb2ce/faab6f419f76a852c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** will debut this week on WMUR-TV Channel 9 and cable television and also has a digital component. "We need to bring back the economy so our families can preserve the American dream," says Corky in the ad opening.

The ad explains that the USA Plan focuses on providing incentives to businesses to bring jobs back from China and bring manufacturing jobs to New Hampshire. The plan also calls for keeping taxes low on small businesses and limiting government regulation.
|
---
**North Country Tour Includes Stops in Colebrook and Errol**
Corky spent last week in the North Country, with stops at popular hang-outs and meeting with local business people. Many thanks, especially, to the owners of Mostly Muffins, L.L. Cote, Flint Farm, and the Federal correctional officers Corky had dinner with in Berlin. It was a valuable experience for Corky as he had the opportunity to learn more about what this election is really about – representing Granite Staters as a U.S. Senator with their conservative values.
|
---
**Fundraiser Focuses on Returning Republicans to the NH House**
Corky was proud to attend a fundraiser this past week with former U.S. Senator Kelly Ayotte, hosted by the Committee to Elect House Republicans. Gov. Chris Sununu also was on hand, as the crowd of GOP loyalists showed their support for the group’s goal: electing a Republican majority in the N.H. House of Representatives.
|
---
**Sign of the Times**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e8d645d1abbcb2ce/fdb6843919337d75c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Want a Corky sign for your lawn or street corner? Looking for another way to show your support for Corky? An official Corky for Senate yard sign is a great way to show everyone where you stand and support the campaign!

Request yours now before we run out! **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e8d645d1abbcb2ce/f2ff121c13ba450ac3d6b838967d376c/33153)** to learn more.
|
---
**IMPORTANT CORONAVIRUS SUPPORT INFO**
**HEALTH INFORMATION**

New Hampshire Department of Health & Human Services Fact Sheet – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e8d645d1abbcb2ce/766fc8c18ab09754c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
New Hampshire Division of Public Health Services – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e8d645d1abbcb2ce/654a98fbca6b13cfc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
For general assistance, a 211 site to locate resources – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e8d645d1abbcb2ce/1077990b000f0bc5c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
Centers for Disease Control: What to do if you are sick with coronavirus disease – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e8d645d1abbcb2ce/bba5f6a3ef1ddaa1c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

**RESOURCES FOR BUSINESSES/EMPLOYMENT**

NH Department of Employment Security
Due to COVID-19, all claims and questions should be directed to **[nhes.nh.gov](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e8d645d1abbcb2ce/745c3ffc0495f4aac3d6b838967d376c/33153)** or call the Unemployment Assistance Hotline at 603-271-7700.

Resources for Small Business – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e8d645d1abbcb2ce/fb509639b979991fc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

**RESOURCES FOR PARENTS AND SCHOOLS**

NH Department of Education – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e8d645d1abbcb2ce/ec9275e02eaa52f7c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
How to Home School Your Children – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e8d645d1abbcb2ce/2045d950d539b540c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

**FOR ASSISTANCE – FOOD**

School Food and Nutrition Service – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e8d645d1abbcb2ce/59c3002964562387c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

**HOW YOU CAN HELP**

NH Food Bank – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e8d645d1abbcb2ce/d137529756b878c8c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

subject: Don't miss my one-on-one with Sean Hannity!
body:
http://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=Don%27t+miss+my+one-on-one+with+Sean+Hannity%21:&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=38d60914b4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_07_03_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-38d60914b4-68212193 https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2Fd98268f1b62b%2Fdont-miss-my-one-on-one-with-sean-hannity Tweet (http://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=Don%27t+miss+my+one-on-one+with+Sean+Hannity%21:&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=38d60914b4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_07_03_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-38d60914b4-68212193 https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2Fd98268f1b62b%2Fdont-miss-my-one-on-one-with-sean-hannity)
http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=38d60914b4&e=f6564bbe3b Forward (http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=38d60914b4&e=f6564bbe3b)

** Don't Miss My One-on-One Interview With Sean Hannity!
------------------------------------------------------------
https://youtu.be/29xyezjfjjk?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=38d60914b4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_07_03_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-38d60914b4-68212193
In my one-on-one interview with Sean Hannity we discuss his next book and why he wrote it now, how he balances being a public figure and maintaining a private life and how flawed a candidate Joe Biden is. Check it out.
#ICYMI this week on Spicer&Co:
* Sean Hannity (https://youtu.be/29xyezjfjjk?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=38d60914b4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_07_03_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-38d60914b4-68212193) discusses his new book, the 2020 election and his public life
* Duck Dynasty's Phil Robertson (https://youtu.be/MbChKLJMiGQ?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=38d60914b4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_07_03_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-38d60914b4-68212193)
* Congressman Devin Nunes (https://youtu.be/v_9mv_0wtx4?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=38d60914b4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_07_03_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-38d60914b4-68212193) on Big Tech influencing the 2020 election
* Will Microsoft make a deal with TikTok, with Trish Regan (https://youtu.be/YjPueRA0iAU?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=38d60914b4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_07_03_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-38d60914b4-68212193)
* Steve Krauker (https://youtu.be/TsTqvvt_eHc?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=38d60914b4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_07_03_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-38d60914b4-68212193) talks about the left and media's distrust of President Trump

Coming up next week on Spicer&Co:
* Secretary Mike Pompeo on Monday
* Senator Marsha Blackburn
* Gordon Chang
* Michael Pillsbury
* Dick Morris and more!

Leading America Update

I'm finishing up the final edits on my manuscript this week and getting closer to the release of my second book, "Leading America". I'm looking forward to it's release and you all reading it.

I take a deep dive into my journey on Dancing with the Stars and some of my experiences with the media, education, big tech and corporate America since leaving the White House. It's even more clear to me now that President Trump's policies are what we need to move our country forward.

It comes out October 13, 2020, but I would appreciate your support in pre-ordering it now!

Pre-order it now here (https://www.amazon.com/Leading-America-Commitment-Patriotism-Capitalism-ebook/dp/B084MDY19D/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=leading+america&qid=1588613239&sr=8-1&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=3e679cbd12-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_07_30_06_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-3e679cbd12-&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=38d60914b4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_07_03_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-38d60914b4-68212193) .

Thanks,

Sean

name: Team MJ Hegar
subject: Tipping point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
What kind of future do you want?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e70/7f51f7bc/40f4e719/4ef78142/1614846130/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

This election is a tipping point for America.

Will we take power back from the corporate PACs that have been holding our political system hostage?

Will we stand up against hate and divisiveness and build a more just and equitable country?

Will we elect leaders who truly represent the people they work for?

**[We can. Together. Help lead America into a brighter future by electing MJ.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e70/7f51f7bc/40f4e719/4ef78141/1614846130/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200807.2nd__1853__&amount=10")**

We have an opportunity to choose our path forward, Peter, but we need real leadership to make change. That means flipping the Senate by electing public servants who will bring our values to Washington.

**[Will you fight for our future and help elect MJ today?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e70/7f51f7bc/40f4e719/4ef78141/1614846130/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200807.2nd__1853__&amount=10") **

\-- Team MJ

|

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e70/7f51f7bc/40f4e719/4ef78140/1614846130/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1853&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e70/7f51f7bc/40f4e719/4ef78147/1614846130/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Together, we can drain the swamp
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
I’m running for Congress to replace Susan Wild for a number of reasons, but one of the top ones being that we must drain the swamp of Washington insid Peter, I’m running for Congress to replace Susan Wild for a number of reasons, but one of the top ones being that we must drain the swamp of Washington insiders, just like Susan.
If you’re unsure of what this exactly means, I wanted to once again raise the fact that just a few days ago, Susan Wild received an endorsement from former President Barack Obama. But -- that’s just the tip of the iceberg. She’s already received a plethora of endorsements from the swampiest of members and PACs.
**[We’re positive that over the next hours, this endorsement will cause MILLIONS to be shoveled into Susan Wild’s campaign, and we are building up our defenses as fast as possible with our DOUBLE MATCH opportunity!](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=a87aeb05bf1a4fb58c64514a6cef9563&_e=eaZUJmL1v5K4ehY5ILm05Q-ZgXAo0YRoCk4BwpkL5qGvMfJPMPbMW8wfCkWPXoYH7UHg96fdRxtDOBp3QNmP6nGutjrz5Y9ft2EWgevf_uQqa0fXXxeFtKRv0zSCsFXDe73mxL0EtsEmz1JJL4i30BZhzoBdex_nJS70zU8n890gmXqiyL3emNDghkePxBXCc6If0ORhdXrAkhTt7TF_YoRJb39l4FLMWLvTnG5yOIhM4xVdw_Ol27qkDNjKPw74ySjHVLDK-IPYNrnlkF4dZ9gURbuLfdmS-7jI-li87btMEMmEhaySDhzBVo8irqmgWu-NVT5faVfcxedOwW6LJfWfSj1U2KrbKBDLJadNPh4Hi8ASorGWVCyMGhAS5I8vG4efSPMRoA7_KqjxQadJ_f-Zh5EZvVFc43FxykwuEMTC06E-PhiGnLg_OAOPesQR65N2BdR2_rwwHe0XuMxryg%3D%3D)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda?=
subject: Amanda Makki Wins Back-to-Back Polls –St. Petersburg Chamber of Commerce Straw Poll!
body:
| A Message From Amanda Makki for Congress | |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=59dffd84fc&e=ee1c0329b3)
---
| | **Amanda Makki Wins Back-to-Back Polls –
St. Petersburg Chamber of Commerce Straw Poll!**
---
| **St. Petersburg, FL –** Yesterday, the St. Petersburg Chamber of Commerce hosted their virtual ‘Candidate Conversations’ event and ended with a straw poll that included Florida’s 13th Congressional race. Frontrunner, Amanda Makki, was the Republican primary candidate of choice by far.

“The opportunity to listen to the business owners and employees concerns from the St. Petersburg Chamber of Commerce was fantastic! I shared why I am the best candidate to partner with President Trump to get our post-COVID 19 economy back on track, lower healthcare costs for small businesses and fight for term limits. I am humbled to know that Pinellas voters see me as the best candidate to achieve those things. By winning both Chamber of Commerce straw polls in the Tampa Bay Area, I know we are speaking the voice of the people who want to see a conservative agenda, a Member of Congress who stands with President Trump and is the only Conservative candidate who can retire Charlie Crist in November,” said Makki.
---
|
---
| As the Republican frontrunner candidate for Florida’s 13th Congressional District, Amanda Makki has received the endorsements from esteemed military veterans including Representative Lt. General Jack Bergman, the highest-ranking combat Veteran ever to serve in Congress, Senator Joni Ernst, the first female combat Veteran ever elected to the United States Senate, Congressmen Michael Waltz (Lt. Colonel), Congressman Neal Dunn (Major), and combat Veteran Robert O’Neill of the elite Navy SEAL Team 6.

In addition, she is endorsed by House Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy, Republican Whip Steve Scalise, Health Care Ranking Member and Physician Michael Burgess, as well as Florida Congressional Representatives John Rutherford and Neal Dunn. Locally, Amanda has the support of Seminole City Councilor Thom Barnhorn, Belleair Beach Mayor Joseph Manzo and Treasure Island Commissioner Tyler Payne. She was named to the National Republican Campaign Committee’s Young Guns program as one of the top “Contender” candidates.

Additionally, Amanda has received over 25 major endorsements including The American Conservative Union, the Conservative groups FreedomWorks, Republican Main Street Partnership PAC, and Maverick PAC as well as groups supporting the strongest female candidates in the U.S. including VIEW PAC, Maggie’s List, and Rep. Elise Stefanik’s E-PAC, that helps female GOP candidates. She is also supported by the American College of Emergency Physicians and Associated Builders & Contractors Florida Gulf Coast Chapter.
---
| ###
---
| [CONTRIBUTE HERE](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=963823df63&e=ee1c0329b3 "CONTRIBUTE HERE")
---
|
---

You can [update your preferences](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/profile?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=7510f43dc3&e=ee1c0329b3) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=7510f43dc3&e=ee1c0329b3&c=513c5511a1).
---

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Statewide airwaves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
One way you know we're now officially 88 days away from Election Day? Turn your TV, and there are political ads! We've officially arrived. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/statewide-airwaves?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_Statewide Airwaves_** One way you know we're now officially 88 days away from Election Day? Turn on your TV, and there are political ads! We've officially arrived.

This week,**Governor Holcomb** [launched the first ad of Indiana's general election](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=82144fd5f9&e=1acd9bb3d6). It's called "Proud to Be a Hoosier," and I think it perfectly encapsulates the unity Hoosiers have displayed over the last few months. As the governor narrates in the ad, _"We're a strong resilient group of Hoosiers, and there's no challenge we can't overcome when we come together." _

And through these difficult times, we've come together under** Governor Holcomb's **leadership. Usually, Hoosiers don't see their governors lead firsthand, but these aren't usual times. Hoosiers have tuned in and watched every step of the way, and they've seen the tough decisions. **Governor Holcomb** and Hoosiers statewide have grieved together, celebrated together, and they're continuing to weather this storm together. It's a unique bond.

We're excited to be up on the air with this uniting message. We've purchased seven-figures worth of television ad time, and we're taking our message statewide.

We are One Indiana. And we are One Indiana for All. If you haven't seen it yet, you can [watch and share the ad here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=61a13bf4f2&e=1acd9bb3d6). \- Chairman Kyle Hupfer

|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
|
---
---
| **_Building One Indiana For All_** Yesterday, **Governor Holcomb** [earned the endorsement of the Indiana Manufacturers Association](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c5d949977a&e=1acd9bb3d6) (IMA)! He joined the IMA for the announcement at Major Tool and Machine, a contract manufacturer located in Indianapolis that employs more than 400 Hoosiers.

**Governor Holcomb** has worked throughout his administration to build the best environment for manufacturers. And as part of his Back on Track Plan, he has worked to help safely jumpstart the state’s economy. **_“Indiana’s manufacturers produce everything from cars and RVs to vital PPE. But beyond that, they also produce great Hoosier jobs and opportunity as we continue to build One Indiana for All. I thank the Indiana Manufacturers Association for their support as we continue to support our job creators across the state.” – Gov. Holcomb_** As **Governor Holcomb** continues building One Indiana for all, he is dedicated to keeping Indiana the top state in the nation for manufacturing.

Earlier this week, **Governor Holcomb** also announced measures to support Hoosier housing stability as the moratorium on evictions and foreclosures ends on August 14.
* **The Indiana Rental Assistance Program** is available for Hoosier renters who have lost income because of the pandemic, are having trouble paying rent and face eviction. For more information and to apply, [Hoosiers outside of Marion County can check here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d95ade9be5&e=1acd9bb3d6). [Hoosiers in Marion County can check here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a07dcae1d7&e=1acd9bb3d6).
* **The Indiana Foreclosure Prevention Network** is for Hoosiers who are struggling with mortgage payments due to involuntary employment-related financial hardship. Hoosiers at risk of foreclosure can seek assistance through Indiana’s Hardest Hit Fund. [To apply, check here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b4908d3509&e=1acd9bb3d6).
* **The Settlement Facilitation Program for Landlords and Tenants** this new program through the Indiana Office of Judicial Administration will help tenants and landlords reach agreements in eviction lawsuits by using a neutral third party facilitator. If an agreement is reached, the dispute and any further court action is ended.

The Indiana Housing and Community Development Authority has also built a [COVID-19 resource page](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=79cb92fe75&e=1acd9bb3d6) that is continually updated as their housing assistance programs become available and are updated. Check it out [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=103501fe0e&e=1acd9bb3d6).

To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=83ad94e408&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2766fdc5a7&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8968274564&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

Period. Instead of an agenda attacking our constitutional rights, these liberal attorney generals should be focused on restoring the rule of law in our country." - Todd Rokita**_ As attorney general, **Todd Rokita** will always stand up for and defend Hoosiers' 2nd amendment rights.

But it doesn't just stop at the 2nd Amendment. As the leader behind Indiana's first-in-the-nation voter ID law, **Todd Rokita** will also work to help continue safeguarding our elections! body:
As Tens of Thousands of Votes Remain Uncounted, Transparency and Accuracy at Stake | | | Dear Friend,

Phil Murphy, his minions, and the RINOs in our party are trying to steal the senate nomination.

**[But I'm not going to let them and I need your help](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=da5700bee7&e=3e017fab0f).**

It's now been 1 month since Election Day, and the Republican contest for U.S. Senate remains completely up in the air.

## Earlier this week, we were told Middlesex County was done counting... then we find out more than ten thousand votes are _still_ being counted today. The nonstop lies from the media and political officials charged with giving the public the truth is just ridiculous.

Murphy's Democrat Attorney General Gubir Grewal is fighting us tooth-and-nail in every county, in every hearing, to falsely certify the race before it's over and stop our efforts to ensure every vote is counted in an honest and transparent recount.

In spite of Phil Murphy and Grewal's machinations, we've managed to stay ahead in the fight because of contributions from patriots like you. But we still need more support to ensure every vote is counted.
---
| [DEMAND RECOUNT NOW](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=cb53a31d7b&e=3e017fab0f "DEMAND RECOUNT NOW")
---
| But Murphy and Grewal know that if they can terminate this election before all the votes are counted, they can do the same in November and deliver the state to Cory Booker — **and every congressional district to Democrats as well.**

I can't do this alone. I need your financial support _TODAY_ , because we're combating the Attorney General on every front.

This election will set the stage for future elections in America. We cannot afford to let it fall into the hands of the radical left. They are scared of losing their power — and they should be. With your help, we'll make sure their time is up.

-Hirsh

PS: [With your support](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=1e7c72ec49&e=3e017fab0f), we'll hold the radical left accountable and ensure every vote is counted in the fight for the U.S. Senate nomination.

# Singh Says AG is Compromised
#### _As Tens of Thousands of Votes Remain Uncounted, Transparency and Accuracy at Stake_

**LINWOOD, NJ** — Hirsh Singh, the conservative candidate seeking the Republican nomination for U.S. Senate is pitted in a tug-of-war with Governor Phil Murphy's Attorney General Gurbir S. Grewal over the failed vote-by-mail election held on July 7th.

"Tens of thousands of ballots remain uncounted, rejected or lost, disenfranchising tens of thousands of New Jersey voters," Singh said. "But Phil Murphy's Attorney General couldn't care less because he's more interested in representing the interests of Phil Murphy than the interests of the people."

Singh, who recently filed for a recount in the Republican Primary for U.S. Senate, has been appearing before Superior Court judges in each of New Jersey's 21 counties. While recounts have been approved in three counties so far, Attorney General Grewal's office has been fighting tooth and nail to stop the recounts or impose draconian fees in order to conduct them.

"The AG's office is completely and utterly compromised," Singh said. "Phil Murphy is hellbent on ending in-person voting and imposing vote-by-mail permanently, so the Attorney General's Office is doing everything they can to hide how much of a failure the July 7th election has been."

Singh said that more than four weeks after Election Day, counties remain unable or unwilling to provide basic information about the election, such as:
* How many mail-in votes were received before or after the deadline;
* How many mail-in votes were rejected and why;
* How many mail-in voters were given the opportunity to "cure" their ballots and how many voters did so;
* How many provisional votes were received;
* How many provisional votes were rejected and why;
* How many votes that were intended to be counted remain uncounted and when that initial count will ever be done;
* How many ballots with clear markings were not tallied by scanners; and
* How many ballots were counted despite bearing July 8th postmarks.

"If elections officials cannot manage a relatively small number of votes in a primary election," Singh wondered, "How will they ever manage two, three, or four times as many in November?"

Media reports indicate that over 27,000 ballots were rejected in the July 7th election, however, Hudson County alone is said to have rejected over 6,000 ballots.

"The people of New Jersey deserve fair, open and honest elections," Singh declared. "But the Attorney General's Office isn't fighting for that. Instead, they are pursuing a political vendetta against our campaign that began with bullying tactics. It continues today as they seek to wield influence over judges who are being asked to approve the recounts."

Singh will be heard by judges in two more counties later today and said he expects decisions on recounts in two other counties to be handed down imminently.

"We will not stop fighting for every properly cast vote to be transparently and accurately counted," Singh said. "It's shameful that we can't count on the Attorney General to do the same."

clean_body: As Tens of Thousands of Votes Remain Uncounted, Transparency and Accuracy at Stake | | | Dear Friend, Phil Murphy, his minions, and the RINOs in our party are trying to steal the senate nomination. . It's now been 1 month since Election Day, and the Republican contest for U.S. Senate remains completely up in the air. Earlier this week, we were told Middlesex County was done counting... then we find out more than ten thousand votes are still being counted today. The nonstop lies from the media and political officials charged with giving the public the truth is just ridiculous. Murphy's Democrat Attorney General Gubir Grewal is fighting us tooth-and-nail in every county, in every hearing, to falsely certify the race before it's over and stop our efforts to ensure every vote is counted in an honest and transparent recount. In spite of Phil Murphy and Grewal's machinations, we've managed to stay ahead in the fight because of contributions from patriots like you. But we still need more support to ensure every vote is counted. | "DEMAND RECOUNT NOW" | But Murphy and Grewal know that if they can terminate this election before all the votes are counted, they can do the same in November and deliver the state to Cory Booker — and every congressional district to Democrats as well. I can't do this alone. I need your financial support TODAY , because we're combating the Attorney General on every front. This election will set the stage for future elections in America. We cannot afford to let it fall into the hands of the radical left. They are scared of losing their power — and they should be. With your help, we'll make sure their time is up. -Hirsh PS: , we'll hold the radical left accountable and ensure every vote is counted in the fight for the U.S. Senate nomination. | "DEMAND RECOUNT NOW" | | | | August 7th, 2020 FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Contact: mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release | | Singh Says AG is Compromised As Tens of Thousands of Votes Remain Uncounted, Transparency and Accuracy at Stake LINWOOD, NJ — Hirsh Singh, the conservative candidate seeking the Republican nomination for U.S. Senate is pitted in a tug-of-war with Governor Phil Murphy's Attorney General Gurbir S. Grewal over the failed vote-by-mail election held on July 7th. "Tens of thousands of ballots remain uncounted, rejected or lost, disenfranchising tens of thousands of New Jersey voters," Singh said. "But Phil Murphy's Attorney General couldn't care less because he's more interested in representing the interests of Phil Murphy than the interests of the people." Singh, who recently filed for a recount in the Republican Primary for U.S. Senate, has been appearing before Superior Court judges in each of New Jersey's 21 counties. While recounts have been approved in three counties so far, Attorney General Grewal's office has been fighting tooth and nail to stop the recounts or impose draconian fees in order to conduct them. "The AG's office is completely and utterly compromised," Singh said. "Phil Murphy is hellbent on ending in-person voting and imposing vote-by-mail permanently, so the Attorney General's Office is doing everything they can to hide how much of a failure the July 7th election has been." Singh said that more than four weeks after Election Day, counties remain unable or unwilling to provide basic information about the election, such as: How many mail-in votes were received before or after the deadline; How many mail-in votes were rejected and why; How many mail-in voters were given the opportunity to "cure" their ballots and how many voters did so; How many provisional votes were received; How many provisional votes were rejected and why; How many votes that were intended to be counted remain uncounted and when that initial count will ever be done; How many ballots with clear markings were not tallied by scanners; and How many ballots were counted despite bearing July 8th postmarks. "If elections officials cannot manage a relatively small number of votes in a primary election," Singh wondered, "How will they ever manage two, three, or four times as many in November?" Media reports indicate that over 27,000 ballots were rejected in the July 7th election, however, Hudson County alone is said to have rejected over 6,000 ballots. "The people of New Jersey deserve fair, open and honest elections," Singh declared. "But the Attorney General's Office isn't fighting for that. Instead, they are pursuing a political vendetta against our campaign that began with bullying tactics. It continues today as they seek to wield influence over judges who are being asked to approve the recounts." Singh will be heard by judges in two more counties later today and said he expects decisions on recounts in two other counties to be handed down imminently. "We will not stop fighting for every properly cast vote to be transparently and accurately counted," Singh said. "It's shameful that we can't count on the Attorney General to do the same." | ### For any inquiries, please reply to this message or send an email to: mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release Additional information is available on our and page. name: Bill Olson
subject: People are voting now I need help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fupbg3PRWF6OuRU&b=mZVTTvFpnj.0NEtfp7.X9A

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help to restore sanity to Congress!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fupbg3PRWF6OuRU&b=mZVTTvFpnj.0NEtfp7.X9A

I just wish someone would restore sanity to America! These vicious rioters in Portland, Chicago, Seattle and other liberal cities are not just causing havoc.

They are trying to take away your very freedoms, our American freedoms, and up until now.... they are succeeding.

Remember how the Fascistic the "Anti-Fascist", or Antifa, terrorist movement became? They refuse to allow free speech or debate, and are intimidating Americans from speaking their mind:

Self-censorship is on the rise according to a new Cato Institute survey that reports nearly two-thirds of Americans are afraid to share their political views.

A new CATO Institute/YouGov national survey found 62% of Americans say the political climate today prevents them from saying what they believe. This is up several points from 2017 when 58% of Americans said they were afraid to share their political beliefs.

“31% of liberals, 30% of moderates and 34% of conservatives are worried their political views could get them fired or harm their career trajectory,” the CATO survey stated.

The time has come to stop the Left's "Cancel Culture", and restore the First Amendment so Americans can be Americans again!

A recent poll conducted by Politico found that a plurality of Americans believe cancel culture has gone too far. (RELATED: Poll: Large Plurality of Americans Say Cancel Culture Has Gone Too Far)

“There have been shifts across the board, where more people among all political groups feel they are walking on eggshells,” the CATO survey found, adding, “majorities of Democrats (52%), independents (59%) and Republicans (77%) who all agree they have political opinions they are afraid to share.”

“Strong liberals stand out, however, as the only political group who feel they can express themselves. Nearly 6 in 10 (58%) of staunch liberals feel they can say what they believe,” the CATO survey found.

This problem isn't limited to Portland or Seattle. They won't just attack combatants- they have attacked the elderly and innocent and anyone they just didn't like the look of!

Unless we stop these nutty Stalinist bigots now, this will be the future of every American city.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fupbg3PRWF6OuRU&b=mZVTTvFpnj.0NEtfp7.X9A

Stalinist thugs terrorizing normal Americans. Where does it end?

This Maoist dystopia is Seattle, today; and it will be America, tomorrow- unless we do something RIGHT NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fupbg3PRWF6OuRU&b=mZVTTvFpnj.0NEtfp7.X9A

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fupbg3PRWF6OuRU&b=mZVTTvFpnj.0NEtfp7.X9A

Thank God President Trump is sending Federal Law Enforcement into these crazy liberal cities to put down these Antifa terrorists. There must be law and order!

This garbage isn't legal, it isn't Constitutional, and is hard-line Communism- this isn't the America ANY of us know! We must fight now or our country and our freedoms will be lost. Will you stand with me

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fupbg3PRWF6OuRU&b=mZVTTvFpnj.0NEtfp7.X9A
?

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fupbg3PRWF6OuRU&b=mZVTTvFpnj.0NEtfp7.X9A

I'm a soldier- not a slick politician. But I remember that I have taken an oath to the Constitution! I don't have big PAC money, which is why I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fupbg3PRWF6OuRU&b=mZVTTvFpnj.0NEtfp7.X9A

I need your help today- to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms against the radical Socialists!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fupbg3PRWF6OuRU&b=mZVTTvFpnj.0NEtfp7.X9A

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fupbg3PRWF6OuRU&b=mZVTTvFpnj.0NEtfp7.X9A
Florida is crucial for the Republicans. It's now the President's home state, with many swing districts like mine that we can flip!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fupbg3PRWF6OuRU&b=mZVTTvFpnj.0NEtfp7.X9A
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

I appreciate whatever you can send so we can defeat Socialist Darren Soto and stop America from becoming Seattle!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fupbg3PRWF6OuRU&b=mZVTTvFpnj.0NEtfp7.X9A

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fupbg3PRWF6OuRU&b=mZVTTvFpnj.0NEtfp7.X9A
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fupbg3PRWF6OuRU&b=mZVTTvFpnj.0NEtfp7.X9A
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: The Doctor-Patient Relationship, the Debates must go on, and remembering our friend Lloyd Marcus
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20220-7a18515d43fd4e51b59650ea1942455a/80/602/622ab24c-f43c-4f28-8b20-2fc3932d2a6d)** Everything Big Government touches it ruins. We've seen this universal truth play out time and time, and time again. From ruining the education system with Common Core to socializing our healthcare system with Obamacare, everything the bureaucrats get their hands on, they ruin. And in the coronavirus era, they've found their latest target: doctor-patient relationships. Since America's Frontline Doctors and subsequent Big Tech censorship reignited the conversation surrounding hydroxychloroquine, we have seen the Big Government bureaucrats make their move. They want to have a say in the medication you and your doctor decide is best for you. Instead of allowing you to consult the expert (your doctor), where the two of you come to a mutual decision based on what's best for you, your life and your health -- bureaucrats want to step in and limit your options. Not on the basis of what's best for your health, but on the basis of what's best for them politically. We cannot allow this to happen. Whether it be hydroxychloroquine or countless other treatments for various ailments, your decision should be made by you and your doctor alone. Keep government out of it. **[If you agree, please consider signing our letter to the President.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIwLTdhMTg1MTVkNDNmZDRlNTFiNTk2NTBlYTE5NDI0NTVh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTYzh5dlBzb0ZpV19TQUVsYnA1TnAwVE9qUUJYYVpIS0Z6dHRvVjdsLXp3cDExLXVnL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MjQ5MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=PlCdmK6N7iT6a9Fq8RPETg)** [ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIwLTdhMTg1MTVkNDNmZDRlNTFiNTk2NTBlYTE5NDI0NTVh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTYzh5dlBzb0ZpV19TQUVsYnA1TnAwVE9qUUJYYVpIS0Z6dHRvVjdsLXp3cDExLXVnL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MjQ5MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=HSE8fPdz8-b6Pux-bhfdYQ) **[Sign Our Letter About Hydroxychloroquine](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIwLTdhMTg1MTVkNDNmZDRlNTFiNTk2NTBlYTE5NDI0NTVh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTYzh5dlBzb0ZpV19TQUVsYnA1TnAwVE9qUUJYYVpIS0Z6dHRvVjdsLXp3cDExLXVnL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MjQ5MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=J6TIFGL5yxT0em4V1ovVjA)**
We need President Trump’s help to resolve a very important and urgent problem that is preventing licensed physicians from prescribing Hydroxychloroquine (HCQ) for off-label uses. **[Sign the letter...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIwLTdhMTg1MTVkNDNmZDRlNTFiNTk2NTBlYTE5NDI0NTVh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTYzh5dlBzb0ZpV19TQUVsYnA1TnAwVE9qUUJYYVpIS0Z6dHRvVjdsLXp3cDExLXVnL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MjQ5MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=9XrJtno2fcnKEdJrkYz07g)** | |
---
In a pathetically predictable move, Democrats have officially begun their campaign to cancel the presidential debates...

Democrats have thrown a bunch of different excuses against the wall in what can only be described as a last-ditch effort to see what sticks. From coronavirus "restrictions" to saying it’s no longer necessary to debate at all, Democrats are deploying every excuse they can think of.

And where are we finding these excuses? In the pages of the DNC propaganda machine, formerly known as the mainstream media.

This attempt is as pathetic as it is predictable. [As we pointed out on Twitter this week](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIwLTdhMTg1MTVkNDNmZDRlNTFiNTk2NTBlYTE5NDI0NTVh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9UUFBhdHJpb3RzL3N0YXR1cy8xMjkxODE3MDI3MjA4OTEyODk4P3M9MjAmbWlkPTQyNDkxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=PFVXnXy9z5VAhV1gL7Tuog), there is one reason and one reason only Democrats don't want Joe Biden to debate. Team Biden knows the second Joe Biden steps on that stage, President Trump will expose him for the incompetent fraud he really is.
|
---
If you haven't already, you have to check out Congressman Ken Buck's new book, [_Capitol of Freedom: Restoring American Greatness_](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIwLTdhMTg1MTVkNDNmZDRlNTFiNTk2NTBlYTE5NDI0NTVh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYW1hem9uLmNvbS9DYXBpdG9sLUZyZWVkb20tUmVzdG9yaW5nLUFtZXJpY2FuLUdyZWF0bmVzcy9kcC8xNjQyOTM1MDc3P21pZD00MjQ5MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Mq83By9hxX6ASiXzWoaLOg) with Shonda Werry, and with a foreword from Senator Mike Lee.

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIwLTdhMTg1MTVkNDNmZDRlNTFiNTk2NTBlYTE5NDI0NTVh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYW1hem9uLmNvbS9DYXBpdG9sLUZyZWVkb20tUmVzdG9yaW5nLUFtZXJpY2FuLUdyZWF0bmVzcy9kcC8xNjQyOTM1MDc3P21pZD00MjQ5MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=c85q94Q4GGer5cruC-RrYA)

**[Capitol of Freedom: Restoring American Greatness](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIwLTdhMTg1MTVkNDNmZDRlNTFiNTk2NTBlYTE5NDI0NTVh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYW1hem9uLmNvbS9DYXBpdG9sLUZyZWVkb20tUmVzdG9yaW5nLUFtZXJpY2FuLUdyZWF0bmVzcy9kcC8xNjQyOTM1MDc3P21pZD00MjQ5MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=H9B37X5Ag6LT0iz5mcECiQ)**
As progressives reject the Constitution to implement their socialist agenda, Congressman Ken Buck argues that we must reclaim our heritage of liberty by applying the principles we learn through the U.S. Capitol’s art, architecture, and artifacts. **[Buy Today!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIwLTdhMTg1MTVkNDNmZDRlNTFiNTk2NTBlYTE5NDI0NTVh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYW1hem9uLmNvbS9DYXBpdG9sLUZyZWVkb20tUmVzdG9yaW5nLUFtZXJpY2FuLUdyZWF0bmVzcy9kcC8xNjQyOTM1MDc3P21pZD00MjQ5MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=bXu6bu2sgVng2lL-gzyDww)**
|
---
Our Co-Founder, Jenny Beth Martin, joined The Tennessee Star Report with Michael Patrick Leahy to remember the late Lloyd Marcus. You can [read the interview](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIwLTdhMTg1MTVkNDNmZDRlNTFiNTk2NTBlYTE5NDI0NTVh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90ZW5uZXNzZWVzdGFyLmNvbS8yMDIwLzA3LzMwL2NvLWZvdW5kZXItb2YtdGhlLXRlYS1wYXJ0eS1tb3ZlbWVudC1qZW5ueS1iZXRoLW1hcnRpbi1yZWZsZWN0cy1vbi10aGUtcGVhY2Utc2hlLXNhdy1pbi1wYXJ0eS1tZW1iZXItbGxveWQtbWFyY3VzLz9taWQ9NDI0OTEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=dKDESk0fZQ20owwBTWxMFg) and [enjoy this beautiful video tribute](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIwLTdhMTg1MTVkNDNmZDRlNTFiNTk2NTBlYTE5NDI0NTVh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9fd3JJWm96OTJvUT9taWQ9NDI0OTEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=olVm8dRYFzWJUctMVsBjew) to Lloyd Marcus.

RIP, Lloyd. You will be missed greatly.
|

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Why I'm fed up with the anti-American far-left:
body:
This campaign is ready to go to Washington to roll heads and destroy the far-left’s vice-grip on American culture...
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387503-913485-5131267-d1cb600da4-8e4af056ec)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387503-913485-5131267-d1cb600da4-8e4af056ec) This campaign is ready to go to Washington to roll heads and destroy the far-left’s vice-grip on American culture... but right now, we face huge headwinds:

More and more conservative voters here in Florida are telling us they're afraid to go to the polls... due to the uptick in coronavirus cases.

**I need your help to show them just how high the stakes are in 2020 for our nation** ... by ramping up our campaign’s Get Out The Vote efforts immediately.

[**Will you help me come out swinging and fight for every last voter here in Florida by pitching in an emergency $19 or more right away?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387503-913485-5131266-2302197616-8e4af056ec)

[**Please pitch in $19--or even $31 or more--now.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387503-913485-5131267-d1cb600da4-8e4af056ec)

I’ll be blunt: we _never_ imagined a situation where large pockets of our own supporters are too nervous to _even go to the polls_ on Election Day.

**We’re looking at one of the strangest elections ever... where only the most passionate supporters are willing to vote.**

That means we have to make two cases to voters:

* First, we have to keep doing what we’ve been doing: **show them why they should vote for me over my Democrat opponent**.

* But second, we need to dramatically ramp up our Get Out The Vote efforts... and show them **why they must vote,_no matter what happens_ in the months between now and Election Day**.

It’s a tall order. And it’s going to be tough... but **if any campaign can pull this off, it’s this campaign**.

But only if we have your support.

[**Will you help us ramp up our Get Out The Vote efforts immediately... and help us mobilize voters against the far-left in November?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387503-913485-5131267-d1cb600da4-8e4af056ec)

[**Please pitch in $19--or even $31 or more--right away.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387503-913485-5131267-d1cb600da4-8e4af056ec)

Like you, **I’ve been _horrified_ to watch spineless Washington Republicans “play nice”**... as the far-left takes over academia, the media, Silicon Valley, and even major corporations.

In 2020, we’re truly fighting for the soul of our nation... and **if Republicans lose, we could lose our nation as we know it forever**.

I’ve spent my entire career as an investigative journalist punching back against the far-left... and exposing the truth about their evil campaign of hate, lies, and anti-Americanism.

That’s made me some big enemies. I’ve even been permanently banned from Facebook and Twitter.

But you know what? **I’d rather make enemies than sacrifice the future of our great nation.**

**If you’re ready to help me fight tooth-and-nail for the future of our nation, I need your help to win this race.**

[**Please pitch in $19 or more to help this campaign ramp up our Get Out The Vote efforts... and win in November.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387503-913485-5131266-2302197616-8e4af056ec)

Laura Loomer

P.S. Getting voters to actually vote on Election Day is harder than ever in a global pandemic... and I need your help to rally their support.

[**Please make your most generous donation of $19 or even $31 right away.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387503-913485-5131267-d1cb600da4-8e4af056ec)

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: The keepers of Hoosier hospitality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Governor Holcomb knows that we’ve all been impacted by COVID-19, and potentially nobody’s been harder hit than our tourism industry | | |
---|---|---
Friends,

Governor Holcomb knows that we’ve all been impacted by COVID-19, and potentially nobody’s been harder hit than our tourism industry, the keepers of our world-renowned Hoosier hospitality.

Many museums had to close their doors, festivals had to refrain from putting up their tents, and musicians had to stop performing. Most of our arts and cultural organizations have had to temporarily cease operations.

However, Governor Holcomb and Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch are working hard to make sure these institutions can reopen!

Lt. Governor Crouch announced Wednesday that a _**$10 million grant will help fund these beloved programs**_ , preserving them and their history within our local communities. Federal CARES Act money provided through the Indiana Destination Development Corporation will ensure that events, festivals, fairs, expos, and gatherings continue to be valuable and vital parts of our lives.

If you or someone you know belong to one of the following categories, you may be eligible to receive a portion of this grant starting August 10:
* Arts and cultural organizations
* Museums
* Theaters
* Community event organizations
* Festival organizations
* Destination marketing organizations

You can find the application **[here](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f1d06b6899964060915d9f2e792c36a2&_e=t6CiMpr90SlklZOroUXaZc8OmZguGTfsoOJ57sL_wykrqkf3v9DQb6kuM1nEoUkI6YKsSr80ySQYAEQY2g02bKHS4W5dIPPKpIVimA7-ERPui2DM1UheiJJzf2qYvZM56An3BGeYUB4tFtCFNedg2ZdEYiQWbih7e0Z6fuuOvTK-xJhPYDv6sp87zYNdt87jfA1H3tgBJtJTPYoWqqdGAghfCEw_bZj4vw_30ciEXAwwk0-_Uq7MM6-bNtxEp38aW5hSPc2u1LSpZOH5luLGkQVw8gERKttdsukb3h9mUq1wv6Lu-Ghvlrr1_Q_Dj1p674I5Al_ANmCG_OmYy4E1hb-mwqvmBM8m4RvFRgeUNGoKvosqmXj8UUAAkQ-k1aO0ODKVUu2YbXQoYhU42kf8-owpuXvSGZ3I0T0zccE5_A8cJNjoHR9o3-nT9X3BYvz4E3ZJZGnOmRf6tiO3dzrOvYKDPcZHDUMvwca2HDwJPGXLs0MFSEMl-7DQWKzTl6H2)**.

Hoosiers, I don’t know about you, but we are ready to stroll through galleries, eat a funnel cake, and enjoy live music in the park once again! We’re one day closer to getting there, and these grants will help. So, remember to wear your mask, wash your hands, and social distance. We can all do our part to support our tourism industry!

#BackonTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew
---
---
|
|
| |

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
The U.S. economy added 1.8 million jobs in July and the unemployment rate fell to 10.2 percent, providing reassurance that the labor market has kept.. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=05d89bcf6e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**U.S. Economy Adds 1.8 Million Jobs in July, Unemployment Rate Falls to 10.2%**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af87cb3288&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Breitbart_
“The U.S. economy added 1.8 million jobs in July and the unemployment rate fell to 10.2 percent, providing reassurance that the labor market has kept up some of its post-lockdown momentum . . . The economy has added around 9.1 million jobs in the past three months,” beating economist predictions three months in a row, John Carney reports.

**MORE:**[**Jobs Numbers in July Beat Expectations for Third Straight Month**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b45c06ecd2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump Signs Executive Order to Boost U.S. Drug Manufacturing**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5aad16675f&e=3ee4985eea)
_-Reuters_
“President Donald Trump on Thursday signed an executive order aimed at boosting U.S. production of medicines and medical equipment, lowering drug prices and protecting the United States against shortfalls in a future pandemic,” Jeff Mason and Andrea Shalal write. “‘We cannot rely on China and other nations across the globe, that could one day deny us products in a time of need,’ Trump said. ‘We have to be smart.’”

**President Trump** : **_[“We have rejected globalism and embraced patriotism.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=57e25ee54a&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/president-trump-we-have-rejected-globalism-and-embraced-patriotism/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rr")_**
---
|
---
| [**Abolish the Police? Those Who Survived the Chaos in Seattle Aren’t So Sure**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f3fb0958c0&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The New York Times_
“The employees of Bergman’s Lock and Key say they were followed by demonstrators with baseball bats. Cure Cocktail, a local bar and charcuterie, said its workers were asked by protesters to pledge loyalty to the movement . . . The experience of the small-business owners seems a universe away from the rhetoric of Seattle’s politicians,” Nellie Bowles writes.
---
|
---
| [**Ivanka Trump Announces Goal of $6 Billion in Capital for Women-Owned Businesses Initiative**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=71051d55f1&e=3ee4985eea)
_-Daily Caller_
“Ivanka Trump announced the White House Women’s Global Development and Prosperity Initiative’s new goal of $6 billion in capital for women-owned businesses,” Katie Jerkovich reports. “The Trump Administration is committed to ensuring that women have an equal opportunity to participate in the economy at home and around the world,” Ms. Trump said.
---
|
---
| [**White House Seeks Crackdown on U.S.-Listed Chinese Firms**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8629a1b673&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“Chinese companies with shares traded on U.S. stock exchanges would be forced to give up their listings unless they comply with U.S. audit requirements under a plan recommended Thursday by the Trump administration,” Dave Michaels writes. “It is the latest step in the administration’s policy of getting tough with China.”

🎬 **WATCH** : [**For years, Washington let unfair trade destroy U.S. jobs**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8341037d42&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bf2c73c85f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=14ff3e05dc&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ba6a3c5f12)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c483a14060&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=32cc237119&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ba6a3c5f12)

name: Rita Hart
subject: We can't lose sight of what matters most

body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/f_ksxCFsp3M97TdqryXwHdmw4vNE3fXSDOLpyRLqSEc=/ZSO-Vv3VjJfSAl4b5ketWN3uod0pJzdpGakJn0Kk-TQ=?refcode=200807-email) I'm running in one of the most competitive districts in the country, and the race that recent polls just called the most competitive in Iowa, because I know the people of IA-02 deserve a representative who listens to them and understands that health care isn't just a political issue -- it's a personal issue, too. We can't lose sight of the issues that matter most to us. We can't become wrapped up in divisive, partisan politics like those of my opponent who supported a partisan plan that would repeal the ACA. **[We need to stand up for our community in the face of such divisive politics. We need to stand together and advocate for our community so we can lift each other up. Can you donate $15 to ensure we can beat divisiveness in November?](https://act.myngp.com/el/f_ksxCFsp3M97TdqryXwHdmw4vNE3fXSDOLpyRLqSEc=/ZSO-Vv3VjJfSAl4b5ketWN3uod0pJzdpGakJn0Kk-TQ=?refcode=200807-email&amount=15)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/f_ksxCFsp3M97TdqryXwHdmw4vNE3fXSDOLpyRLqSEc=/ZSO-Vv3VjJfSAl4b5ketWN3uod0pJzdpGakJn0Kk-TQ=?refcode=200807-email) We need to make sure every single person in Iowa's second district knows about my mission before they're flooded with ads from the dark money groups backing my opponent. In a district that Trump won in 2016, we need to prepare for a hard-won race. That's why I'm asking for your help right now. **[Will you donate whatever you can today so we can continue running our ads across the district and ensure our message is reaching voters? We can't afford to wait, especially when the contrast between my opponent and me couldn't be more clear](https://act.myngp.com/el/f_ksxCFsp3M97TdqryXwHdmw4vNE3fXSDOLpyRLqSEc=/ZSO-Vv3VjJfSAl4b5ketWN3uod0pJzdpGakJn0Kk-TQ=?refcode=200807-email).** Yours, Rita Hart | ******_**Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. Team Ben Ray

---
[](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30e/18e32a7f/4dee5331/7b2109c7/1662678096/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30e/18e32a7f/4dee5331/7b2109c4/1662678096/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30e/18e32a7f/4dee5331/7b2109c5/1662678096/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30e/18e32a7f/4dee5331/7b2109fa/1662678096/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30e/18e32a7f/4dee5331/7b2109fb/1662678096/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30e/18e32a7f/4dee5331/7b2109f8/1662678096/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30e/18e32a7f/4dee5331/7b2109f9/1662678096/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30e/18e32a7f/4dee5331/7b2109c5/1662678096/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30e/18e32a7f/4dee5331/7b2109c7/1662678096/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30e/18e32a7f/4dee5331/7b2109fe/1662678096/VEsEBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: re: Christy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

This November we have the chance to change our country for the better.

We can elect leaders who govern with dignity and get our government to work for people.

The voters of California's 25th district have that opportunity in November -- and I can tell you right now that I know Christy Smith is the right candidate for the job. **[Will you join me and make a donation to elect Christy today?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd13/29776869/9309f80/569e9729/2798142756/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MDdfYWtyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2008_email_christy?refcode=em20_200807_akresend_in")**

Christy knows that clinging to partisanship is not the right way to lead. Leaders need to come together and actually do the work to put our country back on the path to progress.

**[That's why I'm with Christy all the way -- but right now she needs you. Christy is relying on grassroots donors, not corporate PACs or D.C. lobbyists, to fund her campaign. Can you contribute $5 or more now towards her goal?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd13/29776869/9309f80/569e9729/2798142756/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MDdfYWtyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2008_email_christy?refcode=em20_200807_akresend_in")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd13/29776869/9309f80/569e972a/2798142756/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MDdfYWtyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2008_email_christy?refcode=em20_200807_akresend_in&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd13/29776869/9309f80/569e972b/2798142756/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MDdfYWtyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2008_email_christy?refcode=em20_200807_akresend_in&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd13/29776869/9309f80/569e9724/2798142756/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MDdfYWtyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2008_email_christy?refcode=em20_200807_akresend_in&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd13/29776869/9309f80/569e9725/2798142756/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MDdfYWtyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2008_email_christy?refcode=em20_200807_akresend_in&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd13/29776869/9309f80/569e9726/2798142756/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MDdfYWtyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2008_email_christy?refcode=em20_200807_akresend_in&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd13/29776869/9309f80/569e9729/2798142756/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MDdfYWtyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2008_email_christy?refcode=em20_200807_akresend_in")
Here's the thing about this election: It's not enough to win the White House. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to expand our House majority and retake the Senate. CA-25 is key to that plan.

In 2018, Democratic activists flipped the 25th district for the first time in 25 years. Now we can do it again, and we are fortunate to have an experienced leader like Christy on the ballot.

When times are hardest, we need representatives who we can trust to have our backs. I know the people of the 25th district can trust that Christy will serve them with their best interests in mind -- that's why I'm proud to have endorsed her as part of my Win Big Project.

Christy is ready to work across the aisle to get things done, and she will be a representative her constituents can count on. But right now she's counting on your support.

I need Christy fighting alongside me in Washington. So, I'm asking you to join me in supporting her by contributing $5 to help her win in November. **[Click here to donate to her campaign.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd13/29776869/9309f80/569e9729/2798142756/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MDdfYWtyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2008_email_christy?refcode=em20_200807_akresend_in")**

Thanks so much,

Amy Klobuchar

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd13/29776869/9309f80/569e9729/2798142756/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MDdfYWtyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2008_email_christy?refcode=em20_200807_akresend_in")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd13/29776869/9309f80/569e9729/2798142756/VEsHBA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA4MDdfYWtyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2008_email_christy?refcode=em20_200807_akresend_in")
---
