---|---
|
This email was sent by **[Christy Smith](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd13/29776869/9309f80/569e9727/2798142756/VEsHBw/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")**
PO Box 301, 24307 Magic Mountain Pkwy, Valencia, CA 91355.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd13/29776869/9309f80/569e9720/2798142756/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd13/29776869/9309f80/569e9721/2798142756/VEsHAQ/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

name: Rob Portman
subject: we’re paying the price
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
We’ve been paying the price of China’s lies for almost six months now. Peter,
We’ve been paying the price of China’s lies for almost six months now.
That’s right, Peter. China lied about the severity of COVID-19. They actively worked to understate just how threatening the situation was. And now, the entire world is paying the price.
They must be held accountable.
But Peter, what’s almost just as bad? The fact that the Radical Far Left does not want to hold them accountable for their actions that have cost us countless lives.
That’s why I’m calling on you right now to join me in this fight to push back against the Chinese Communist Regime and the Radical-Left to let them know this will not stand in America.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Ed Markey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
The polls are neck and neck. The primary is just a few weeks away. And people are requesting their mail-in ballots and making up their minds right now. The next few weeks of grassroots organizing coul | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525039/45c30650/1cd1f1c87/66e805d8/1865264313/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I'm glad to endorse Ed Markey, my partner in the United States Senate, for re-election this year.

As an author of the Green New Deal, he's on the front lines of the movement for good-paying clean energy jobs and environmental justice.

As someone who grew up in a blue-collar neighborhood, he knows firsthand the needs of working-class families.

And as a champion for working people in Massachusetts and across the country, he's ready to keep up the fight with another term in the Senate.

But he's in a tough race right now. The polls are neck and neck. The primary is just a few weeks away. And people are requesting their mail-in ballots and making up their minds right now. **The next few weeks of grassroots organizing could make all the difference -- so now's the moment to make sure his team is fully funded.**

**[If it makes sense for you right now, please chip in $2 or whatever you can to support Ed Markey's Senate re-election campaign and Warren Democrats. You'll help fund Ed Markey's get-out-the-vote program in these powerfully important final weeks-- and you'll help elect Democrats like up him and down the ballot.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525039/45c30650/1cd1f1c87/66e805db/1865264313/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWVtIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVUwMkZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwODA3X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-em?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU02F_EGR_END_E_20200807_V1S1_P")**

He has spent his career as a champion for clean energy jobs -- and as Big Oil's worst nightmare.

He's got a plan to make the strong gun laws in Massachusetts a model for the entire country.

And his voice is critical in so many other fights -- from ensuring universal health care, to tackling the opioid crisis, to guaranteeing net neutrality, to making sure our government puts people first as we respond to this public health and economic crisis.

**Ed is my friend and my partner in the Senate. I've got his back, and he'll always have yours.**

**[If you're able to make a donation right now, will you pitch in to help fund Ed Markey's campaign in these powerfully important final weeks, and help elect Warren Democrats across the country?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525039/45c30650/1cd1f1c87/66e805db/1865264313/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWVtIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVUwMkZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwODA3X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-em?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU02F_EGR_END_E_20200807_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525039/45c30650/1cd1f1c87/66e805db/1865264313/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWVtIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVUwMkZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwODA3X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-em?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU02F_EGR_END_E_20200807_V1S1_P")

#
Join Dani on Monday, August 10th at 6 pm for a conversation with Rebecca Munoz Ripley, the Executive Director of the Sauk Valley YWCA.

Dani and Rebecca will discuss issues ranging from women's representation in Congress to defending access to birth control. We are proud to partner with Action for a Better Tomorrow-Sauk Valley for this event!

The event is free. Register by [clicking here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=761b56b05e&e=140a9b81e7).

body:
It was "not much" of an attack |

Friend -- Did you know that Wednesday **_Donald Trump held a Georgia tele-rally_** and **_attacked Jon Ossoff_**?

Name-calling from Trump doesn't ruffle Jon's feathers, especially when it's as mild as being called "not much."

**But the fact that, with the state exceeding 200,000 COVID-19 cases, Trump held a virtual rally with Georgians and called Jon names shows _just how SCARED Trump is of Jon beating David Perdue_.**

**Friend, we've got Trump, Perdue and the rest of the Republicans on their toes.**

They know this race is the most competitive in the country. _In fact, Roll Call just added Perdue to its list of the 10 most vulnerable Senators in 2020._

And Jon has all the momentum.

Trump and Perdue think a few rallies will make Georgians ignore their failed leadership.

**The people of Georgia know exactly who Trump and Perdue have been looking out for in office -- and it's not them.**

With almost 160,000 Americans dead and Georgia now over 200,000 COVID-19 cases, Trump and Perdue continue to downplay the coronavirus pandemic, which they both have said is "going very well."

**Now, Trump and Perdue, both of whom are multi-millionaires, think an extra $600 a week is too much for unemployed workers.**

**_And amid millions of Georgians filing jobless claims in the last six months, Trump actually bragged about the state's unemployment numbers during the tele-rally._**

Trump and Perdue have no record to run on, and they're falling in the polls. So the GOP is opening up its war chest to stop Democrats from winning in Georgia.

_Mitch McConnell's super PAC just committed another $6.6 million to Georgia. That's over $30 million so far of outside money into the state!_

The people of Georgia deserve new leadership.

**[Make a donation right now to show Trump and Perdue that we're going to elect Georgia Democrat Jon Ossoff this November.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e275d/5b2c1286/3e81b462/25f1df67/36522163/VEsHAA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_06_dt_at_jo?refcode=em_2020_08_07_dt_at_jo_k")**

Let's keep up the momentum,

Ellen Foster

clean_body: It was "not much" of an attack | Friend -- Did you know that Wednesday Donald Trump held a Georgia tele-rally and attacked Jon Ossoff? Name-calling from Trump doesn't ruffle Jon's feathers, especially when it's as mild as being called "not much." But the fact that, with the state exceeding 200,000 COVID-19 cases, Trump held a virtual rally with Georgians and called Jon names shows just how SCARED Trump is of Jon beating David Perdue. Friend, we've got Trump, Perdue and the rest of the Republicans on their toes. They know this race is the most competitive in the country. In fact, Roll Call just added Perdue to its list of the 10 most vulnerable Senators in 2020. And Jon has all the momentum. name: Team Joe
subject: Will you host a virtual Convention watch party in Pennsylvania?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
When we launched this campaign, we made a promise to build our team in communities all over the country to reach folks where they are -- call by call, text by text, person by person. Because that's ho |
---
Peter -- The Democratic National Convention is just a couple weeks away. It's a major turning point for our campaign and it's critical that momentum stays high to make this moment huge. So we'll keep it simple on what we need: **OUR GOAL:** Bring this year's Convention to millions of people across the country, in their homes and communities, to cheer on Joe Biden officially accepting the Democratic presidential nomination. **WHO:** We need to show that our movement is fired up to elect Joe Biden as our next president and move our nation forward. So we're turning to top members of our grassroots coalition (that's you!) for help. **WHAT:** *drumroll* Hosting a virtual watch party! **[(If you're already sold, sign up to host here»)](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad3/1cd0ac28/17d78b42a/357eb1d7/1582534059/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.mobilize.us/backtobluepa/c/pa-convention-day-four/event/create/?source=JB_EM_ORG_2020.08.07_B8_convention-host_X__F1_S1_C1__bg&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=JB_EM_ORG_2020.08.07_B8_convention-host_X__F1_S1_C1__bg&utm_term=pa")** **WHEN:** Mark your calendar for August 20, 2020 **WHERE:** Online! These are _virtual_ watch parties, similar to Zoom or Google hangout. This isn't your neighbor's Oscar's party: Your guests join the party on their computers and enjoy from their own couches. **WHY:** Through these tough times, we're all searching for ways to connect with each other and do something good. Virtual watch parties bring us together safely to celebrate this pivotal moment. **HOW:** **[Sign up and become an official Team Joe Convention host! We'll give you all the tips, tricks, and details to host your virtual party.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad3/1cd0ac28/17d78b42a/357eb1d7/1582534059/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.mobilize.us/backtobluepa/c/pa-convention-day-four/event/create/?source=JB_EM_ORG_2020.08.07_B8_convention-host_X__F1_S1_C1__bg&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=JB_EM_ORG_2020.08.07_B8_convention-host_X__F1_S1_C1__bg&utm_term=pa")** When we launched this campaign, we made a promise to build our team in communities all over the country to reach folks where they are -- call by call, text by text, person by person. Because that's how we will win this election. How we do that may have changed, but we're sticking to our promise and having you in our corner will help us succeed. **[If you're ready to get started, sign up to host a virtual watch party during the Convention»](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad3/1cd0ac28/17d78b42a/357eb1d7/1582534059/VEsFBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.mobilize.us/backtobluepa/c/pa-convention-day-four/event/create/?source=JB_EM_ORG_2020.08.07_B8_convention-host_X__F1_S1_C1__bg&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=JB_EM_ORG_2020.08.07_B8_convention-host_X__F1_S1_C1__bg&utm_term=pa")** Thanks for being on our team. Team Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad3/1cd0ac28/17d78b42a/357eb1cd/1582534059/VEsCBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad3/1cd0ac28/17d78b42a/357eb1cc/1582534059/VEsCAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad3/1cd0ac28/17d78b42a/357eb1cb/1582534059/VEsCAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad3/1cd0ac28/17d78b42a/357eb1ca/1582534059/VEsCAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad3/1cd0ac28/17d78b42a/357eb1c9/1582534059/VEsCAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad3/1cd0ac28/17d78b42a/357eb1c8/1582534059/VEsCDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad3/1cd0ac28/17d78b42a/357eb1c7/1582534059/VEsCDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad3/1cd0ac28/17d78b42a/357eb1c6/1582534059/VEsDBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad3/1cd0ac28/17d78b42a/357eb1c5/1582534059/VEsDBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad3/1cd0ac28/17d78b42a/357eb1c4/1582534059/VEsDBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad3/1cd0ac28/17d78b42a/357eb1c7/1582534059/VEsDBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad3/1cd0ac28/17d78b42a/357eb1c3/1582534059/VEsDAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad3/1cd0ac28/17d78b42a/357eb1c6/1582534059/VEsDAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bad3/1cd0ac28/17d78b42a/357eb1c2/1582534059/VEsDAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

| | **BREAKING: NC-06 is one of the seats "most likely to flip this November"
[_CHIP IN NOW ->_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d295/3d199a51/2f55f4ff/7364a943/473167543/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJrbWUyMDA4MDciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibmVnIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200807?refcode=kme200807_neg_other&amount=5")** I have a big campaign update to share with you: we have new reports that our district is one of the 10 congressional seats most likely to flip on Election Day. This is awesome news, but we can't take anything for granted. North Carolina is one of the most expensive and competitive battlegrounds of 2020. We need to harness all of our grassroots energy if we're going to flip NC-06 for the first time in 30 years and make Kathy the first woman to ever represent the district. name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Mace=20for=20Congress?=
subject: WEEK IN REVIEW
body:
| | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/9db0b4242513/4lgx4hmh1k-2088334?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=9b92915ffc&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| |
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Team Mace had a jam-packed week of events, listening and learning from the people of SC-01 how to bring Lowcountry values to Congress. We are ramping up events and sharing our message of #LowcountryFIRST far and wide, all across the district. Nobody will work harder than Team Mace!

See below for coverage of Team Mace on the campaign trail.

We can't do this without you. Thank you so much for your support!
---
|
---
|
---
| [LIVE FROM NANCY'S FACEBOOK: Nancy Mace kicks off Veterans Town Hall Tour and announces veterans coalition](http://LIVE FROM NANCY'S FACEBOOK: Nancy Mace kicks off Veterans Town Hall Tour and announces veterans coalition Rep. Nancy Mace kicked off her Veterans Town Hall Tour this past Thursday evening at VFW Post 10625 in Mt. Pleasant. There she announced the formation of the Veterans for Mace coalition, chaired by Gen. James Livingston, and listened to the needs and concerns of our American heroes. )
Rep. Nancy Mace kicked off her Veterans Town Hall Tour this past Thursday evening at VFW Post 10625 in Mt. Pleasant. There she announced the formation of Veterans for Mace, chaired by Gen. James Livingston, and listened to the needs and concerns of our American heroes.
---
| [THE STATE: We must do more to support our military veterans across SC and the United States](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=3408c81da1&e=f1831b4ca2)
"I will carry my sense of reverence for them and their families when I am in Washington, D.C. — both when voting on sending them to war and on providing them services when they return." [Read the rest of Nancy's piece here.](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=544245994c&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| [CHANNEL 2: ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=f5bc739fda&e=f1831b4ca2)[Nancy Mace Visits Lowcountry COVID-19 Testing Laboratory, Vikor Scientific](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=dfa4af19fa&e=f1831b4ca2)
Rep. Nancy Mace toured Vikor Scientific, a local provider of COVID-19 testing and medical testing laboratory on Wednesday morning. Vikor Scientific is a leader in COVID-19 testing. Its state of the art facility tests 7,000 to 8,000 swabs a day and has a 24 hour turnaround time.
---
| [ENDORSEMENT: Nancy Mace is Don Jr.'s MAGA Candidate of the Week](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=61d6261d9f&e=f1831b4ca2)
Our team is overwhelmed by the momentum and support that our campaign is receiving! Thank you to Donald Trump Jr. for the putting your trust in Nancy. We work hard to stand up for Lowcountry families, and put America first.
---
| [YOUNG GUN: Nancy Mace graduates to the final tier of the NRCC's Young Gun Program](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=b70e554848&e=f1831b4ca2)
"Young Guns is a recruitment program led by House Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy and run by the NRCC that identifies candidates across the country who embody the principles of the House Republican Conference and show promise of running a successful campaign...Young Guns is broken into three levels containing measurable goals that a candidate must achieve to advance in the program. Candidates who achieve Young Gun status have successfully collaborated with the NRCC and completed the benchmarks that establish a path to victory on Election Day."
---
|
---
Nancy Mace's interview with Channel 2.
|
---
Nancy greeting a veteran at her Veterans Town Hall Tour.
|
---
Nancy and Gen. Livingston addressing Veterans for Mace coalition members.
|
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=58672a552b&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| **[WEBSITE](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=8b79acfe08&e=f1831b4ca2) | [FACEBOOK](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=3617b4feec&e=f1831b4ca2) | [TWITTER](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=a0100cf549&e=f1831b4ca2) | **[**DONATE**](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=fca3bfe972&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
|

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Texas is officially a "toss-up"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Recent polling shows that Texas is officially a "toss-up" state — meaning
that the race for president is basically tied.

This news is a great reminder that flipping Texas blue and stopping Trump
isn't impossible, but that we still have work to do. That's why we do what
we do: call voters to turn them out to vote in November, day in and day
out.

So far, Powered By People volunteers have already made 2.25 million calls
to contact Texas voters. This month, we're hoping to reach even more — and
we're looking to you to join us. Can we count on you to sign up for an
upcoming phone banking shift?

Upcoming events:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34397?source=ema20200807-100489&t=1001&akid=100489%2E444211%2EASTLFt ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34397?source=ema20200807-100489&t=1003&akid=100489%2E444211%2EASTLFt ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34398?source=ema20200807-100489&t=1005&akid=100489%2E444211%2EASTLFt ]Monday, August 17, 6:30 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34398?source=ema20200807-100489&t=1006&akid=100489%2E444211%2EASTLFt ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34399?source=ema20200807-100489&t=1007&akid=100489%2E444211%2EASTLFt ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34399?source=ema20200807-100489&t=1008&akid=100489%2E444211%2EASTLFt ]Wednesday, August 19, 6:30 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34399?source=ema20200807-100489&t=1009&akid=100489%2E444211%2EASTLFt ]Get more info or RSVP »

We hope you'll make the time to join us in the coming
weeks.
Together, we can build the massive wave of voters we need in Texas to flip
the State House and stop Trump forever.

Thanks for everything you do,

Powered By People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1010&akid=100489%2E444211%2EASTLFt

Upcoming events: [ ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto [ ]Thursday, August 13, 6:30 pm CT [ ]Get more info or RSVP » [ ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto [ ]Monday, August 17, 6:30 pm CT [ ]Get more info or RSVP » [ ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto [ ]Wednesday, August 19, 6:30 pm CT [ ]Get more info or RSVP » We hope you'll make the time to join us in the coming weeks. Together, we can build the massive wave of voters we need in Texas to flip the State House and stop Trump forever. Thanks for everything you do, Powered By People

subject: Republicans Attacking Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ryan Chamberlin for Congress [View the FACEBOOK POST HERE to Like, Comment and Share](https://RyanChamberlin
body:
Today I issued a pledge... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ryanchamberlin.com/4-weeks-left-you-can-help-me-win-12616099?e=d703fa4981)
---
| | [ ](http://)
---
| |
## **Tired of Republicans attacking Trump? That’s similar to what’s happening in CD3. So here is what I did...**
Today, I issued a PLEDGE to all my fellow candidates... [](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=ae3d07fb5f&e=d703fa4981) HERE IS THE FULL PRESS RELEASE ->>>
## **CHAMBERLIN CALLS ON ALL CANDIDATES IN DISTRICT 3 CONGRESSIONAL RACE TO PULL PERSONAL ATTACK ADS**
Ocala, Fla. — Today, Ryan Chamberlin issued a clean campaign pledge and called on his fellow candidates in the race to pull all of their negative attack ads by midnight tonight. “Republican voters need a conservative champion that will take on Nancy Pelosi and the socialists in Washington,” said Chamberlin. “I am confident that I am the most conservative candidate in this race, and I don't feel it necessary to use salacious personal attacks to obscure the policy debate." "I encourage my fellow candidates to do the same. Let's keep our firepower pointed at liberals and Pelosi's leftist agenda. For those who feel the need to distract from their own deficiencies by launching negative personal attacks at everyone else, perhaps they should consider dropping out. "We need a conservative willing to stand and fight the left, not just another Republican who bought a seat by running everyone else into the ground. I urge my fellow competitors to pull your negative attack ads by midnight tonight." Paid for by Ryan Chamberlin for Congress [View the FACEBOOK POST HERE to Like, Comment and Share](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=1b92ef1f6a&e=d703fa4981)

name: Biden 2020
subject: Doing a convention roll call in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We have a quick question for you. |
---
Peter -- it's almost here. In 10 days, the Democratic National Convention will kick off the final leg of this campaign, and we're excited to have you on this journey with us!

This year our Convention is happening all across the country, with folks like you participating in every state. We want to know if you'll be watching, and where you'll be watching from!

[We're taking a roll call of our Team Joe Convention Attendees, and we have a quick question for you, Peter: Will you join us in naming Joe Biden as our official Democratic nominee for President by tuning in to the Democratic National Convention?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bae8/1cd0ac28/17e9e46a9/357ebbf4/184854034/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/team-joe-convention-roll-call?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.07_B3_conventionroll_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.07_B3_conventionroll_X__F1_S1_C1__nd") | **Team Joe Convention Roll Call**

Peter, will you be virtually joining us for the Democratic National Convention on August 17-20?
Yes
No

What state will you be tuning in from?
SELECT HEREAKALARAZCACOCTDCDEFLGAHIIAIDILINKSKYLAMAMDMEMIMNMOMSMTNCNDNENHNJNMNVNYOHOKORPARISCSDTNTXUTVAVTWAWIWVWY\--AAAEAPASFMGUMHMPPRPWVI
---
| [COUNT ME IN!](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bae8/1cd0ac28/17e9e46a9/357ebbf4/184854034/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/team-joe-convention-roll-call?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.07_B3_conventionroll_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.07_B3_conventionroll_X__F1_S1_C1__nd")
---
We can't wait to see Joe and his running mate lay out their vision for putting our country back on track to progress during the Convention. It's going to be an amazing week to show the strength and unity of our party!

And with so many special guest speakers and exciting programs to see and be a part of, you won't want to miss any of the action, we guarantee it.

**So, before you close your inbox today, will you let us know if you 'll be joining us online for the Convention? We want to make sure we have as many of Joe's supporters standing with him for this important moment, Peter, so let us know by answering a few quick questions!**

[https://go.joebiden.com/team-joe-convention-roll-call](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bae8/1cd0ac28/17e9e46a9/357ebbf4/184854034/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/team-joe-convention-roll-call?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.07_B3_conventionroll_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.07_B3_conventionroll_X__F1_S1_C1__nd")

Thanks for your support, Peter. We're excited to celebrate this monumental occasion with you by our side!

Biden 2020
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bae8/1cd0ac28/17e9e46a9/357ebbf3/184854034/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bae8/1cd0ac28/17e9e46a9/357ebbf2/184854034/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bae8/1cd0ac28/17e9e46a9/357ebbf1/184854034/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bae8/1cd0ac28/17e9e46a9/357ebbf0/184854034/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bae8/1cd0ac28/17e9e46a9/357ebbef/184854034/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bae8/1cd0ac28/17e9e46a9/357ebbee/184854034/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bae8/1cd0ac28/17e9e46a9/357ebbed/184854034/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bae8/1cd0ac28/17e9e46a9/357ebbec/184854034/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bae8/1cd0ac28/17e9e46a9/357ebbeb/184854034/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bae8/1cd0ac28/17e9e46a9/357ebbea/184854034/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bae8/1cd0ac28/17e9e46a9/357ebbed/184854034/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bae8/1cd0ac28/17e9e46a9/357ebbe9/184854034/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bae8/1cd0ac28/17e9e46a9/357ebbec/184854034/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bae8/1cd0ac28/17e9e46a9/357ebbe8/184854034/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President
